The second run of the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom also takes place at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, as do the para cross-country skiing finals at Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: The concluding live coverage of day eight of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final, are scheduled to come to their conclusions, before attention turns toward the Cortina Curling Olympic Stadium for the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling competition. China were victorious four years ago at the Games in Beijing following their 8-3 victory over Sweden, while Canada claimed the bronze medal after beating Slovakia by the same score

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.sub-title: 2026 Chinese Grand Prix Sprint Race And Qualifying
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie is joined by David Coulthard, Damon Hill, and Ariana Bravo to present action from the opening sprint race of the campaign and the battle for grid positions for the second round of the season at Shanghai International Circuit. Ferraris Lewis Hamilton won the sprint race here last year with Oscar Piastri of McLaren in second. Piastri then went one better in qualifying by claiming pole position on the starting grid, with Mercedes George Russell joining him on the front row

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Retired couple Dabi and Devi cant wait to wave goodbye to the grey skies of Croydon and say hola to the sunshine and heat in the seaside town of Gandia in Valencia. Theyre looking for a second home where they can spend up to six months at a time. With a budget of £180,000, Lee Juggurnauth lines up five impressive options, but will any wow Dabi and Devi enough to make the move?

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Phil Spencer catches up with househunters who were keen to fly the nest. In 2017, Chloe was looking to move out of her parental home and find her own slice of Reading. But Chloes dad, who was helping with funds, had his own idea of what kind of place his daughter should buy, which didnt align with her own thoughts. In 2019, Ella and Grant were looking for their own place to start their lives together. But as Phil soon realised, Grant seemed nervous about moving out of his mums house

programme.title: George Clarkes Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: Camping Pod and a Straw Bale House
programme.desc: A man embarks on an incredible adventure as he converts a freefall lifeboat into a yellow submarine camping pod in honour of his late father, while three daughters and their mother create a straw bale house oozing with rustic charm. George continues his world tour of the UK as he experiences an oriental delight on the Isle of Wight. Together with master craftsman Will Hardie, the host makes an ingenious hidden rock pool for their magical secret garden home

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Highlights
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan presents action from day eight of the Games, held in Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy, where ParalympicsGB were expected to compete for medals in the mens and womens snowboard banked slalom finals, and the womens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final. Other events taking centre stage included the para cross-country skiing finals, the gold medal match in the mixed team wheelchair curling, and the para ice hockey competition, which featured two classification finals

programme.title: The Race for Ancient Egypt in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of two. Documentary using colourised archive footage to explore archaeology in Egypt between the world wars, as the nation strove for sovereignty. The first episode begins in 1922, when Howard Carters discovery of the tomb of Tutankhamun transformed Egyptology into a global sensation and European and American institutions looked to unearth, and control, Egypts ancient heritage. A tense stand-off between Carter and Egypts new government begins, as the authorities seeks a greater say in how their nations ancient past is managed

programme.title: The Roman Empire by Train with Alice Roberts
programme.desc: Alice arrives in Nimes after crossing the Alps by train. The image of a crocodile is everywhere, commemorating Emperor Augustuss victory over Mark Antony and Cleopatra at the Battle of Actium in 31BCE. In Narbonne, Alice revels in more extraordinary Roman artefacts. The train follows the same route as Romes Via Domitia, eventually leading Alice all the way to Spain

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill heads to the mountainous region of Da Lat, a French-built hill station surrounded by pine forests, where he tries meditation with monks at the Truc Lam monastery, picks leaves at the Cau Dat tea plantation, and zooms through the verdant hills on a mountain-top zipline. With his head in the clouds and romance in the air, Bill oscillates between kitschy tourism and earnest moments with locals

programme.title: Stillwater (2021)
programme.desc: Unemployed Bill Baker travels from his home in Stillwater, Oklahoma to Marseille, France to visit his estranged daughter Allison, who was imprisoned five years earlier for a murder she claims she didnt commit. Confronted with an insurmountable language barrier, cross-cultural differences and maddening legal complexity, Baker decides to take matters into his own hands to exonerate his only child after failing to get Allisons case re-opened. Crime thriller, starring Matt Damon and Abigail Breslin

programme.title: Mothering Sunday (2021)
programme.desc: A maid living in post-First World War England secretly plans to meet with the man she loves while her employers are away, seizing a last chance to be together before he leaves to marry another woman. Romantic drama, starring Odessa Young, Josh OConnor, Colin Firth and Olivia Colman

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Theres fireworks ahead as some of the cuffed pairs grapple with being chained to their total opposite. Horse trainer and countryside campaigner Claire, whos 48, is a fierce advocate of hard work. Her handcuffed partner, 29-year-old city-loving model and content creator Bambi loves the easy life. Can Bambi keep up with Claires exhausting work schedule? In London, Green Party councillor Frank, whos 27, and housing lawyer Lin, whos 38, seem to be getting along famously. But Franks in for a shock that leaves him speechless

programme.title: Handcuffed: Last Pair Standing
programme.desc: Some of the pairs have had enough and called it quits. But not 70-year-old Yorkshireman Bob and 38-year-old London youth worker Chris. However, when the latter learns about a shocking incident from his partners past, he wonder whether he can continue. Meanwhile, eco-warrior and vegan campaigner Morag is shocked when the woman she is chained to, petrol-head and beauty salon owner Angie, reveals her views on climate change. Hosted by Jonathan Ross

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Single mother Jo Beck wants to move her family to Derby, despite her children being happily settled in Nottingham. Phil Spencer helps her decide if relocating is the right choice and searches for a suitable home. Also in Derby, Kirstie Allsopp offers advice to outdoor sports enthusiasts Liz and John Fairfield, who are looking for a property with a large garden, storage space for their sporting equipment and no noise from nearby roads

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the companys free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisas new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: So Its Come to This: A Simpsons Clip Show
programme.desc: Barts latest prank wrecks the house and lands Homer in hospital, where he and the family reminisce about all the other injuries and mishaps he has suffered in his eventful and disaster-filled life

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part one of two. Carrie discovers she is expecting a baby. Deacon and Kelly make a move to reconcile, leaving Spence out on a limb, and Arthur asks Doug to build him a bathroom in the basement. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Part two of two. Doug takes on a second job as a chauffeur to supplement his income, pressured by the expense of the new baby and bathroom. Meanwhile, Deacon and Kelly are reconciled with each other - leaving Spence all alone. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge puts a screen-time limit on the rest of the family, but soon realises that she might be the one who is addicted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart starts to bond with Ned, prompting a jealous Homer to decide to start mentoring Nelson in retaliation

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ed Jackson and Billy Monger present coverage of the ninth and final day of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. The first run of the mens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final takes place at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, where ParalympicsGB stars Neil Simpson, Sam Cozens and Fred Warburton are expected to be in action. Attention will then turn to the Tesero Cross-Country Skiing Stadium where a number of para cross-country skiing finals take place, including the mens 20km interval start sitting event, where Scott Meenagh is likely to bring his career to an end. Meenagh was a Scotland U18 international rugby player before losing his legs after stepping on an IED in Afghanistan at the age of 21, and went on to become the first Briton to win a medal in para biathlon, claiming silver in the 12.5km individual event at the 2023 World Para Nordic Skiing Championships. With reports from Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Concluding coverage of the ninth and final day of the Games from Milan and Cortina dAmpezzo, Italy. Medals will be decided in the second run of the mens vision impaired alpine skiing slalom final at Tofane Alpine Skiing Centre, with British stars Neil Simpson, Sam Cozens, and Fred Warburton all hoping for a place on the podium. Elsewhere, the para ice hockey competition is brought to a conclusion with the bronze- and gold-medal matches at Milano Santagiulia Ice Hockey Arena, the latter of which is the final action of the Games. With reports from Alice Tai and Dame Sarah Storey

programme.title: Formula 1
programme.desc: Lee McKenzie is joined by David Coulthard, Damon Hill, and Ariana Bravo to present action from the second round of the season at Shanghai International Circuit, where McLaren drivers Oscar Piastri and Lando Norris finished first and second last season. While the race itself proved to be relatively uneventful, the aftermath was anything but, with Charles Leclerc of Ferrari and Pierre Gasly of Alpine being disqualified due to their cars being underweight, Leclercs teammate Lewis Hamilton also being disqualified for excessive skid wear, and In the days that followed, Red Bull announcing that Liam Lawson would undergo a driver swap with Racing Bulls Yuki Tsunoda

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination of the week is the Horseshoe Hotel in Egton Bridge, North Yorkshire, where a fancy machine causes confusion but breakfast and eco toiletries prove a big hit

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB battle continues in Market Bosworth at the Dixie Arms, run by Alex, whose blingy beds impress two of the guests. However, not all of the facilities are quite as successful

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Bradburys of Blackpool, where former flight attendant Matt is hoping to change his guests perceptions of the seaside town

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final visit of the week is to Little Oakhurst, in Stonyhurst near Clitheroe, run by husband-and-wife team Andy and Joanne. The guests are immediately captivated by the stunning location, with views over the Lancashire countryside, though the optional and additional breakfast brings some mixed reviews. At feedback time, it becomes clear that glamping isnt for everyone

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Payment Day sees Craig and Greta keen to get to the bottom of facilities faults, before Alex points the finger at them about some unsavoury feedback scores. Matt wants to question Alexs cleanliness comments, and Joanne and Andy have some beef over their breakfast scores

programme.title: Devon and Cornwall
programme.desc: In Dartmouth, Nigel Cooper sails his steamboat Halcyon along the River Dart for the clubs annual competition. His boat has won twice in the past - can he make it a hat-trick? In Cornwall, farrier and horseman David Jones is hoping his age-old skills will be passed down the line to daughter Myrtle, as they head out to tackle a rampant bracken problem in an old woodland. And in Cornwalls Trebah Gardens, head gardener Darren Dickey embarks on a new project. To celebrate 30 years of the garden becoming a public trust, hes creating a new Victorian-style stumpery with an array of ferns to delight visitors

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Winter Paralympics Live
programme.desc: Ade Adepitan, Billy Monger, Ed Jackson, Sarah Storey, Sean Rose and Alice Tai present live coverage of the event from Cortina dAmpezzo, as the Paralympic flame is extinguished, signaling the end of the 14th Winter Games. Athletes, artists and spectators from all over the world gather in the Cortina Olympic Curling Stadium to enjoy a spectacular final show. The presenting team look back at all the standout stories and key moments from nine days of elite competition spanning six sports

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Capture, Married at First Sight Australia, Louis Theroux: Inside the Manosphere, The Floor, Will and Ralf Should Know Better, Britains Best Mattress: How to Sleep Better and This Morning (AI boyfriend)

programme.title: The Son (2022)
programme.desc: New York lawyer Peter Miller receives a panicked visit from his ex-wife Kate. Their 17-year-old son Nicholas has been playing truant from school for a month. Peter allows Nicholas to move in with him but the teenager continues to suffer, unable to articulate the darkness that consumes him. Drama, starring Hugh Jackman, Vanessa Kirby and Anthony Hopkins

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Los Angeles to help La Frite, an outdated French restaurant that is failing to make any profits. His first step is to try to reconcile the feuding family members who run the business, and so devises a plan to bring them together by using secret filming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa tries to persuade her family not to take part in the towns annual snake-clubbing ritual, but her words fall on deaf ears as Homer anticipates the event with glee. With the guest voice of Barry White

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Long-standing TV personality Krusty the Clown reaches the end of the road, his days of entertaining kids quashed by an alternative show - prompting his famous friends to come to the rescue. Animation, with the voices of Elizabeth Taylor, Hugh Hefner, Bette Midler and the Red Hot Chili Peppers

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Cambridge, the first hosts are 23-year-old stable owner Alice and her feisty boyfriend Ollie, who reveals that he helped to hunt and butcher the deer theyre serving for their main course. Travel specialists Gareth and Hihine try to throw a more civilised evening, based around a generations-old family Asian menu. On the last night, John and Katy aim to spread the love among the group by serving up the same menu that they had for their wedding six weeks earlier, while John wears his wedding suit and Katy wears half her wedding dress

programme.desc: Sensitive information about the schools male pupils is listed on a bulletin board, and Cartmans furious reaction to the development results in another visit to the principals office. However, this time the youngsters temper lands him in an anger management therapy session

programme.desc: Monica and Rachel plot to take back their old apartment from Chandler and Joey, and there are major changes afoot for lovebirds Ross and Emily. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston

programme.sub-title: The One with All the Wedding Dresses
programme.desc: Chandler reaches the end of his tether over Joeys snoring and forces him to seek professional help, while Rachel has a drastic reaction to Rosss engagement. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross reminisces with Rachel about the good times they had when they were dating, as the invitations go out for his wedding. Meanwhile, the others work out whether they can attend the ceremony. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.sub-title: The One with the Worst Best Man Ever
programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Rosss wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebes pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Rosss wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Rosss wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Rosss massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Beethoven (1992)
programme.desc: An all-American family adopts a huge St Bernard, but the father is dismayed when it turns into a one-dog disaster zone. He insists the mutt must go to a new home, but when it is kidnapped by a crooked vet, dad has a change of heart and races to the rescue. Comedy, starring Charles Grodin, Bonnie Hunt, Oliver Platt and David Duchovny

programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Rosss life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandlers secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In

programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandlers father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monicas relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joeys help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Years Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.desc: Joey somehow manages to lose Rosss wedding ring at the stag party, while Phoebes pregnancy causes her to experience violent mood swings. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. Rachel and a heavily pregnant Phoebe stay at home while Chandler, Joey and Monica go to England for Rosss wedding to Emily. Once there, however, it seems all Joey and Chandler can do is bicker. Guest starring Richard Branson and Sarah Ferguson

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rosss Wedding - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. As everyone makes their final preparations for Rosss wedding in London, Rachel tries to get a flight out to declare her love for him before he marries Emily. Guest starring Jennifer Saunders, Elliott Gould, Hugh Laurie and Tom Conti

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Ross Says Rachel
programme.desc: Despite Rosss massive blunder, he and Emily go through with the wedding - but she is clearly devastated and sneaks out of a window at the reception, declaring she never wants to see him again. Guest starring Helen Baxendale, Elliott Gould and Jennifer Saunders

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Kissing
programme.desc: Rachel returns from Greece and Chandler proves popular with the womenfolk. Phoebe feels upset about missing out on all the excitement in London, so the gang decides to treat her to a weekend in Atlantic City. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Beethoven (1992)
programme.desc: An all-American family adopts a huge St Bernard, but the father is dismayed when it turns into a one-dog disaster zone. He insists the mutt must go to a new home, but when it is kidnapped by a crooked vet, dad has a change of heart and races to the rescue. Comedy, starring Charles Grodin, Bonnie Hunt, Oliver Platt and David Duchovny

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS
programme.desc: Emily makes a request that could change Rosss life for ever, presenting him with a huge dilemma. Chandler upsets Monica by gloating about sex, while Joey challenges Phoebe to perform a completely selfless act. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandlers secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In
programme.desc: Ross moves in with Chandler and Joey, but the transition does not go as smoothly as expected. Danny deals Rachels ego a blow by introducing her to an exceptionally dull date, and Phoebe becomes disillusioned with the health inspector she is seeing

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Thanksgivings
programme.desc: The pals digest a huge Thanksgiving meal and reminisce about their worst holiday experiences, including the time Chandlers father left his mother in favour of the houseboy, and the occasion in 1987 when a teenage Monica overheard Chandler calling her fat. Guest starring Morgan Fairchild

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey tries to cover up Chandler and Monicas relationship - but only succeeds in making himself look stupid. Phoebe persuades Rachel to take a literature class with her, while Ross falls out with his co-workers, convinced one of them stole his prized sandwich

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Inappropriate Sister
programme.desc: Ross struggles to come to terms with life as one of the unemployed, and turns to Joey for advice. Rachel is disturbed by her new boyfriends uncomfortably close relationship with his sister. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with All the Resolutions
programme.desc: The pals announce resolutions for the coming year and Chandler enlists Joeys help so he can kiss Monica at midnight during a New Years Eve party. American comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Courtney Cox

programme.title: Bad Moms (2016)
programme.desc: Three overworked, exhausted and under-appreciated women are pushed beyond their breaking points, so decide to ditch their conventional responsibilities for a binge of long overdue freedom, fun and self-indulgence. Comedy, starring Mila Kunis, Kathryn Hahn, Kristen Bell and Jada Pinkett Smith

programme.title: Lee Evans: XL Tour
programme.desc: The comedians performance in Cardiff, part of his 35-date tour during which he entertained 4,500 fans with topics such as satellite navigation, hotel porters and romantic experiences in the bath

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut
programme.desc: Gok Wan, Sarah Millican, Seann Walsh and Amy Childs join team captains Jon Richardson and Sean Lock on the irreverent panel show, hosted by Jimmy Carr. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Uncut

programme.desc: GK Barry and Jamali Maddix pass judgement on a controversial psychic, someone who ended a friendship over ketchup, and some wild revenge against an ex

programme.title: Iain Stirlings Roast the Internet
programme.desc: Iain is joined by Guz Khan, Lara Ricote, Babatunde Aleshe and Lou Wall for a look at baffling online trends, shameless overshares and truly cursed corners of the internet

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra complains to Ray that he is inconsiderate in bed and their sex life has become a little stale, prompting him to make a saucy purchase to spice things up. Patricia Heaton and Ray Romano star

programme.title: Comedy Game Night
programme.desc: Liza Tarbuck and team captains Sue Perkins and Guz Khan invite guests round to play party games. Tonight they are joined by Scarlett Moffatt, Ollie Locke and Sally Phillips

programme.desc: A chance to buy bargains galore

programme.desc: Teleshopping feature bringing you the hottest destinations and latest deals to ensure your next cruise is your greatest one

programme.title: Stupid Central

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Chandlers Work Laugh
programme.desc: Monica is annoyed by the fake laugh Chandler uses at work whenever his boss cracks a joke and the gang gets a shock when Ross introduces his new girlfriend

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe meets her biological father for the first time and Rachel helps Joey look a little more sophisticated with the addition of a trendy shoulder bag - which everyone else mistakes for a womens handbag

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Everybody Finds Out
programme.desc: Chandler and Monicas relationship finally becomes public knowledge to all but Ross, who is starting to get his life back on track by renting a flat opposite the girls. Comedy, starring Courteney Cox and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Girl Who Hits Joey
programme.desc: Ross makes a bad impression on his new neighbours, and Monica piles the pressure on Chandler, demanding more commitment than he feels able to give. Joeys latest girlfriend proves a little too fiery - but he is afraid to end their relationship

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey wonders why he has started dreaming about dating Monica, while Phoebe finds a police badge at Central Perk and decides to take the law into her own hands

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Inadvertent Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel is interviewed for her dream job, but makes the mistake of inadvertently kissing her prospective employer. Meanwhile, Monica competes with Phoebe in the relationship stakes

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel starts taking regular cigarette breaks to ingratiate herself with new boss Kim and colleague Nancy, even though she does not smoke, while Joey competes with Rosss son for a role in a TV commercial. Comedy, guest starring Joanna Gleason (Boogie Nights)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Cant Flirt
programme.desc: Joey tells everyone about his upcoming TV appearance, little anticipating the surprise awaiting him, and Ross flirts with a pizza-delivery woman, but leaves her decidedly unimpressed

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The guys enjoy a ride in a police car, until the sound of a gunshot causes them to fear for their lives. Meanwhile, Rachel accidentally listens to a telephone message to Ross from Emily. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Gary plans to ask her to move in with him, but fears it is too early in their relationship for such a commitment, and asks Chandler to help her change his mind. While the rest of the gang become obsessed with playing a game of catch. Guest starring Michael Rapaport, with Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Joeys Big Break
programme.desc: Joey turns up in Las Vegas to start filming his first movie role, only to receive disappointing news. Phoebe racks her brains to remember why she hates Ross so much

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part One
programme.desc: Part one of two. The pals visit Las Vegas, where they find surprises galore awaiting them. Meanwhile, Ross misinterprets Rachels intentions and embarks on a campaign of public humiliation against her - but discovers she is more than a match for him

programme.title: Beethovens 2nd (1993)
programme.desc: The slobbering St Bernard is now grown up and in love with his beautiful sweetheart Missy. Together they bring a litter of puppies into the world - but have to go on the defensive when Missys owner, the evil Regina, sets out to steal them for herself. Comedy sequel, starring Charles Grodin, Bonnie Hunt, Chris Penn, Nicholle Tom and Christopher Castle

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One in Vegas - Part Two
programme.desc: Part two of two. Rachel makes Ross regret playing a prank on her, while Monica and Chandler have a spot of good luck and Joey tries out his latest get-rich-quick scheme. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Rachel wake up the morning after their impromptu marriage and regret the hasty circumstances of the ceremony, while Monica and Chandler find that neither of them really wants to rush to the altar. Joey and Phoebe have a cross-country adventure. Comedy, starring David Schwimmer, Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Hugs Rachel
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to move in together, but have difficulty explaining to Rachel that she will not be a part of the arrangement. Meanwhile, Phoebe begs Ross to get his latest marriage annulled. American comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and Courteney Cox

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross encourages Chandler and Monica to move in together and makes a dramatic decision about Rachel. David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry, Courteney Cox and Jennifer Aniston star

programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Loses His Insurance
programme.desc: Ross tries his hand at teaching and adopts an English accent in the process. Joey suffers a hernia and Rachel discovers her marriage has not been annulled. American comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc, David Schwimmer and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Joey is mistaken for the owner of a Porsche and uses the mix-up to enhance his image. Rachel forces Ross to annul their marriage, and Phoebe tries her best to look after the triplets. American comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Jennifer Aniston

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One on the Last Night
programme.desc: Joey and Chandler celebrate their last night as flatmates, and Ross claims he is too busy babysitting to help Monica as she frantically tries to arrange Rachels packing before the removal firm arrives. Comedy, starring Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: An Australian dancer (guest star Elle Macpherson) moves in with Joey and he struggles to refrain from flirting. Chandler tries to impress Monica by cleaning their flat, and Rachel is embarrassed by Phoebes jogging style. Comedy, with Matt LeBlanc and Matthew Perry

programme.desc: A freak accident gives a womanising executive the ability to hear the thoughts of the opposite sex. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. The eaterys decline began when one of the pair started embezzling money to fund his prescription drug addiction, and things only got worse when the he was sentenced to four years in prison. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. The new proprietors, husband and wife duo Darryl and Ellen Cortello, focused all the efforts on the financial side of things, so it is up to Gordon to show them that they first need to love food to make any profit

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.sub-title: Lido, Anna Vincenzos and Le Bistro

programme.desc: Familiar faces return for a dinner party where some celebrate romance, but others face old tensions. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The latest run kicks off with stag and hen nights, as a fresh group of hopeful singles take their final steps toward marrying strangers

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The weddings erupt into chaos when Luke forgets the rings, leaving Mel struggling to move past a rocky start and setting an awkward tone for their reception

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Boy Who Knew Too Much

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family celebrates Maggies birthday. Bart steals Homers wallet to pay for an Itchy and Scratchy souvenir, and Grandma Bouvier is swept off her feet by Grampa - but Mr Burns provides romantic competition, convinced she is the woman for him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The City of New York v Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Barney borrows Homers car and vanishes on a drunken binge. Weeks later, Homer gets a letter from New York saying the vehicle is illegally parked between the towers of the World Trade Centre. Although Homer hates the Big Apple - owing to an unfortunate incident from his youth - the family heads to there to try to get the car back

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: As Principal Skinner prepares to enjoy a ceremony celebrating his 20th year as head of Springfield Elementary, a stranger exposes him as a former street punk who stole his identity. Featuring the guest voice of Martin Sheen

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: After making a mess of a speech at work, Homer tries to bolster his public speaking skills by turning to improvisational comedy. Marge decides to upgrade Barts tumbledown treehouse, but tensions arise when Bart questions her building skills

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge receives a jail sentence for child neglect after letting Bart go to the park unsupervised. While prison serves as a welcome break from her hectic home life, Homer struggles to hold the fort in her absence

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Babatunde Aleshe, Mo Gilligan, Andi Oliver, Rylan, Chris Packham, Shaun Ryder, Bez, Jane McDonald, Sara Cox, Annie Mac, Stephen Mangan, Gyles Brandreth, Lulu, Judi Love, Charlene White, Clare Balding, Alice Arnold and Bobby and Jeff Brazier review shows including Love Island, Bake Off: The Professionals, The Supervet, MILF Manor, Under Paris, The Motorway Hotel and Countdown

programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on The Celebrity Traitors, Trigger Point, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, The Great British Bake Off, Love Is Blind, DIY SOS and BBC News (clocks)

programme.desc: The armchair critics share their views of The Celebrity Traitors, Game of Wool: Britains Best Knitter, Trigger Point, Hunted, Squid Game: The Challenge, Hamzas Hidden Wild Isles and ITV News coverage of the diminution of Prince Andrew to Andrew Mountbatten Windsor

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: North London charmer Ori gets to know primary school teacher and judo black belt Nadia, south London hairdresser Mula is left waiting for her date to turn up, and singer-songwriter Dan aims to impress English student Nathania. Geordie postie Jodie hopes her date with Laura will be first-class, while retired engineer Eric meets part-time actress Jan

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Mula, 23, was stood up on her last visit to the restaurant, and shes hoping round two will be better. Funnyman AJ, also returning, tries to seduce her with his best jokes. Could it be second time lucky? Geordie postie Jodie is back after being friend-zoned last week, and shes pleasantly surprised by Irish beauty Louise. Tom is a suave, confident restaurateur looking for a refined lady, but dance teacher Alliee isnt immediately impressed by his well-rehearsed advances, including petrol-station flowers and champagne

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Pasadena, California, where he visits Jamaican-themed restaurant Cafe Kingston. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Haley and Dylans plan to quietly elope before the babies are born doesnt go as smoothly as they had hoped. Meanwhile, Jay continues to try to get his new business off the ground by courting an Instagram celebrity

programme.title: My Spy (2020)
programme.desc: Special Forces operative turned spy JJ undertakes covert surveillance of Kate Newton, the sister-in-law of a terrorist. JJ is ordered to keep a low profile. Unfortunately, Kates resourceful nine-year-old daughter Sophie blows his cover and blackmails JJ into training her as a spy. Comedy, starring Dave Bautista and Chloe Coleman

programme.title: Sunday Brunch

programme.desc: A retired former special forces agent has the job of chauffeuring the son of a controversial Miami politician. When Russian criminals kidnap the youngster and inject him with a virus in the hope of infecting his father, the driver sets out to find the boy and his abductors. Action thriller sequel, starring Jason Statham, Alessandro Gassman and Amber Valletta

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Dating show hosted by Anna Richardson in which two singletons choose a date from a selection of six naked people, who are revealed to them one body part at a time. They then they whittle the candidates down until only one remains. In the first edition, Aina, a music producer from London, wants to find someone adventurous who she can have a deeper connection with, while Guildford-based designer Mal - who has dated men and women - is curious to see who she will be drawn to when all options are laid bare before her. The first episode features Aina, a music producer from London, and Mal, a designer from Guildford

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on what they have been watching during the week, including Im a Celebrity... South Africa, Obsession, Married at First Sight Australia, Britains Got Talent, Absolutely Dyer: Danny and Dani Do Italy, Big Beasts, The Yorkshire Vet, and ITV News on the governments phone alarm. First shown in April 2023

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their insightful and passionate takes on TV shows including Im a Celebrity South Africa, Citadel, The 1% Club, Celebrity Hunted, Britains Got Talent, Reunion Hotel, and Canal Boat Diaries. First shown in May 2023

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Essex boy Bradley, who hasnt been on a date in more than a decade, is paired with assertive Lucy, an architect from Manchester. Next through the door is Ann-Marie, celebrating her 50th birthday. Having survived four bouts of cancer, she believes time is precious and that love is the most important thing. Her evening gets off to a good start when cleaning company owner Carl arrives with a surprise present. Self-confessed serial dater Mitz considers himself a pro, but his unusual technique - involving telling lies - threatens to derail his meeting with Sarah

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers
programme.desc: The pop-up parlour gets a visit from drag queen Devon, who feels snared by his barbed-wire tattoo as it is a painful reminder of an ex. Alice welcomes Halloween-loving Chippy, who has a spooky portrait of her daughter, Jay tackles an all-you-can-eat buffet tattoo, and Sketch helps Aidan, whose dislike of five pence shopping bags caused him to get carried away with his ink

programme.title: Taskmaster
programme.desc: Greg Davies delivers angry appraisals from his comfy throne, as Ed Gamble dons a babys bonnet, Katy Wix makes Alex Horne wince and Rose Matafeo does a spot of screaming

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts the comedy words-and-numbers quiz, as Sean Lock and Phil Wang take on guest captain Alan Carr and Harriet Kemsley. David ODoherty and Joe Wilkinson join wordsmith Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while maths whizz Rachel Riley looks after the numbers

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Manchester, Gillian and husband Steve kick things off with a simple menu and put the emphasis on presentation. Day two sees Holly and Richard lay on a vegetarian meal, which fails to please Gillian. Foodies Jen and Alex host the final night, featuring some rap poetry

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples based in Manchester take part in the dinner party competition. First up are Raf and Kevin with their healthy menu - unless you include the chocolate cake for dessert, that is. Their flamboyant apartment impresses Chantel and Stephen, but American Matthew seems less impressed. Day two sees Chantel and Stephen hosting a backyard party, while expectations are high on the final evening as food connoisseur Matthew and his wife Jane present an Asian-inspired menu

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back south Londoner Daniel wants to get his wedding grooving like a Caribbean street carnival. However, sensible student bride Sabrina dreams of a more traditional occasion and a wedding her parents will be proud of. While Sabrina pictures a tranquil location, Daniel splashes the cash on trucks and sound systems

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty queen and bride-to-be Yasmin has her heart set on a fairy-tale wedding. Powerlifter Yiannis is taking Yasmins dream to the extreme, but will she be the belle of the ball, or will the nuptials have an ugly twist in the tale?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Beauty therapist Maria is a perfectionist, placing her dream of a country house wedding in the hands of her prankster fiance, Sam

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Mothers boy Tiago plans to put his self-conscious bride Karlette on the big screen at his 1950s drive-in wedding. However, his attention-shunning fiancee wants her wedding day to be something intimate and contemporary

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Competitive adrenaline junkie Mark wants to fly high on his big day and has an adventurous plan to take his wedding to the sky. However, his straight-talking bride-to-be Lynsey is much more down to earth and has a very clear idea of the modest and intimate wedding she wants. While Mark aims to go above and beyond to make his wedding First Class, no nonsense Lynsey just hopes he is thinking about her first and foremost

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Mitchell Modell, CEO of Modells Sporting Goods, goes incognito among his employees. He poses as a contestant on a fake reality TV show, and tries learn more about the people working for his company, which has been in his family for four generations since its founding by his great-grandfather in 1889

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Kat Cole goes undercover among the workforce of her company Cinnabon Incorporated, which serves sweet treats from more than 900 bakeries in 40 countries worldwide. Kat has come a long way after being raised by a single mother who fed her family of three girls on $10 a week. She seeks advice from her old boss, former Hooters CEO Coby Brooks, who also went undercover, in his own organisation. Kat has some lofty goals for Cinnabon to become a worldwide food brand, and wants to make sure that the new products she has put in place are working before she implements her plans

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in at the 90-year-old Monticello Hotel in Longview, Washington, where owner Phillip Lovingfoss has an apparent liking for alcohol that some of his staff claim is threatening to destroy the business. The challenge of turning around the hotels fortunes only increases when the chef sees shocking allegations about Phillip splashed all over the front page of the local newspaper

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: In Oregon, Gordon Ramsay tries to rescue the Applegate River Lodge, which is around $1million in debt. The chef questions whether owner Richard Daviss interest in smoking cannabis is distracting him from the problems at this family-built inn, and encounters Richards sons Duke and Dusty, whose fiery relationship seems to prevent them from working together to tackle the establishments financial troubles

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Starkville, Mississippi, to try to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. Despite having more than 40 years experience in the business, owner David Mollendor is at a loss as to how to make his dream of owning his own hotel work, while his wife Sukie is struggling as its chef, tackling the role without any formal catering experience. Gordon discovers a family tragedy that explains why this couple have become trapped in their business and wrestling with debt

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits a dog-friendly hotel in West Dover, Vermont, that is in urgent need of help. Owner Sandy MacDougall runs the Four Seasons Inn like a hostel, with unpaid staff staying in the rooms instead of paying guests. The acerbic chef aims to get the business back on track before Sandy loses everything, but wonders whether it would be kinder to simply put this dog-friendly hotel to sleep

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Murphys Historic Hotel near Sacramento in northern California, where owners Brian, Kevin and Joel are often too distracted by their lively bar to look after their business. The national landmark, which has played host to an array of famous names including Mark Twain, President Ulysses S Grant and JP Morgan, has no dedicated accommodation manager, so guests sometimes struggle to receive the attention they need and end up feeling the hotel has become an afterthought beside the noisy saloon

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown

programme.title: Black Books

programme.title: Black Books

Comedy, starring Dylan Moran, Bill Bailey and Tamsin Greig

programme.desc: Groom-to-be Tom plans a wedding at his favourite theme park, but his down-to-earth fiancee Becca has always dreamed of being treated like a princess on her special day

programme.desc: Essex groom Gary plans an underwater wedding 200 miles from home, but his bride-to-be Lauren dreams of celebrating her big day in the Home Counties

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Craig decides to plan an Oktoberfest-themed wedding, but his uncompromising fiancee Sofia dreams of a boho beach wedding day

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Stephen J Cloobeck, chairman and CEO of hotel company Diamond Resorts International, becomes the first boss to go incognito at his own organisation for a second time. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Steve Greenbaum goes undercover among the workforce of his company PostNet, which offers design, printing and shipping services to small businesses. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Warwickshire, Katie and Clive kick off with an attempt to recreate a fine-dining menu, but it proves tough to please discerning diner Bianca. Day two sees joker Levi and wife Hannah cook up a Scottish menu with an Asian twist, but the food gets a mixed reception. Finally its Biancas turn to cook for her guests and expectations are high for the foodie of the week to cook up a great meal with the help of husband Dave. But who will secure the £1,000 prize?

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A trio of couples compete to be the best dinner party hosts in Coventry, beginning with joker Neal and his level-headed wife Hazel, who let themselves down with a few cooking errors. Ed and Jess keep things simple on day two, although a secret from Neals past has the diners in hysterics, before Emma and Huseyin round the contest off with a Turkish menu

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Berkshire compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000, with Julian and Lesley, who prepare a meat-heavy menu, Tash and Rob, whose healthy meal has an unwelcome ingredient in the dessert, and Chris and Amanda, who recite their wedding vows during the evening

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Reading compete to host the best dinner party. Upstanding couple Liz and David kick off the competition with a menu replicating the first food they ever cooked together. However, prank-loving guests Jo and Steve take centre stage as talk around the table turns a bit alternative. On fashion models Franky and Charlis night, Liz proves to be the wildcard as she reveals how much shes researched their online portfolios. On the final night, Jo cannot stomach whats on her and Steves own menu. However, it remains to be seen who will walk away with the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to Connecticuts oldest inn, the Curtis House in Woodbury, which has been owned by the Hardisty family for generations. However, the business has started to fall apart and their legacy is on the brink of being lost. Siblings Chris and TJ, who are in charge, no longer speak to each other and the staff and guests feel stuck in the middle

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Pipestone, Minnesota, where he checks in to Historic Calumet Inn. Joint owners Vanda and Rina Smrkovski were given the hotel as a gift by their father, but after just nine months in charge, their staff are on the brink of revolt, and guests are expressing their dissatisfaction with the accommodation. Gordon quickly realises the sisters need to grow up fast if hes going to have a chance of saving the business

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Anglers Lodge in Island Park, Idaho. Owner Dave Eby built the lodge with his own hands, but a family tragedy has caused him and wife Dede to shy away from the hotel and the community. Gordon is desperate to help mend this broken family - but is it too late to save their business?

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Southbridge, Massachusetts, where he checks into the Vienna Inn, an Austrian-themed hotels and restaurant. Owners Jonathan and Lisa Krach have seen their cluttered inn acquire a negative reputation among the locals, and as a result, business isnt what it used to be. Can Gordon turn things round and keep the doors to this historic hotel open?

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Part one of two. Gordon Ramsay heads to Harpers Ferry in West Virginia, where he tries to save the Towns Inn, a historic hotel run by retired teacher and junk hoarder Karan Townsend. She has accumulated so many useless belongings that there is hardly any room to accommodate guests. Can Gordon convince her to get rid of her clutter or will the hotel continue to go down the pan?

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads for Boston to help change the fortunes of a failing Italian restaurant run by two brothers. With the time now served, he has returned, but must first regain his brothers trust before he can save their business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to New Orleans to visit Zekes, a much-loved restaurant that has seen standards slip since the original owner died. programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to the house of the founding father of Impressionism, Claude Monet, in Giverny, where he wastes no time in walking over the famous Japanese bridge to gaze at the water lillies. With his tour of the iconic garden complete, James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of crab and dulse, inspired by Monets need to provide large meals for the brood of eight children he had with his second wife. He also takes a peek inside Monets kitchen, and samples a pike dish served up by local chef Eric Guerin. A trip to a nearby orchard affords James the chance to prepare apple doughnuts, before he returns hope to cook Normandy tart - a local pudding - and an inventive omelette

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef visits the capital city, Paris, exploring one of the largest wholesale food markets in Europe, before setting up a cooking station in one of the warehouses to cook a dish using chicken and mushrooms. James also visits the kitchen of the world-renowned chef, Pierre Gagnaire

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: The chef heads to the house of the founding father of Impressionism, Claude Monet, in Giverny, where he wastes no time in walking over the famous Japanese bridge to gaze at the water lillies. With his tour of the iconic garden complete, James sets up his mobile kitchen to cook a dish of crab and dulse, inspired by Monets need to provide large meals for the brood of eight children he had with his second wife. He also takes a peek inside Monets kitchen, and samples a pike dish served up by local chef Eric Guerin. A trip to a nearby orchard affords James the chance to prepare apple doughnuts, before he returns hope to cook Normandy tart - a local pudding - and an inventive omelette

programme.title: James Martins French Adventure
programme.desc: This time, the chef visits the capital city, Paris, exploring one of the largest wholesale food markets in Europe, before setting up a cooking station in one of the warehouses to cook a dish using chicken and mushrooms. James also visits the kitchen of the world-renowned chef, Pierre Gagnaire

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: On his way back from Sleepy Eye, Isaiah Edwards meets up with a dying old man, whose last request is for Isaiah to take care of his three-year-old, Blanche. It isnt until later that Isaiah realises that this little girl is actually an orang-utan. Most of Walnut Grove is happy to welcome Blanche into their community, but the trouble starts when Harriet Oleson gets involved. Elsewhere, Willie Olesons parents are shocked when their son announces he is planning to get married

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah makes a promise to a dying man that he will find a home for his little girl, only to realise the infant is a baby orang-utan which wreaks havoc in Walnut Grove. Meanwhile, Willie is finally ready to graduate and propose to his girlfriend, but struggles to find the courage to tell his parents that he does not want to attend college.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A hailstorm leaves the Ingalls familys crops in ruin. To recoup the money, Charles and some friendly neighbours - including a light-hearted Englishman - work in a dangerous railroad blasting job. The Englishman, who is employed as a powder-monkey brings both cheer and eventually tragedy to Charles. Caroline, meanwhile, rounds up the farmers wives to salvage whats left of the crops, despite the pessimism that threatens their effort

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura has a crush on a new boy in school named Johnny Johnson. He, however, is interested in Mary, who finds no interest in him. Laura believes Mary is trying to steal him from her, and they fight about it. Charles teaches Laura that one day, a boy will be interested in her too

programme.title: The Ruth Rendell Mysteries
programme.desc: An accountant has a big win on the lottery and thinks all his problems are over, but it is not long before his change of fortune throws his life into more turmoil than he could ever have imagined. Having fallen for the woman of his dreams, the millionaire finds himself at the centre of a menage a trois that ultimately ends in tragedy. Ruth Rendell mystery, starring Jerome Flynn, Sadie Frost, Nick Reding and Liz Smith

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: On his way back from Sleepy Eye, Isaiah Edwards meets up with a dying old man, whose last request is for Isaiah to take care of his three-year-old, Blanche. It isnt until later that Isaiah realises that this little girl is actually an orang-utan. Most of Walnut Grove is happy to welcome Blanche into their community, but the trouble starts when Harriet Oleson gets involved. Elsewhere, Willie Olesons parents are shocked when their son announces he is planning to get married

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Isaiah makes a promise to a dying man that he will find a home for his little girl, only to realise the infant is a baby orang-utan which wreaks havoc in Walnut Grove. Meanwhile, Willie is finally ready to graduate and propose to his girlfriend, but struggles to find the courage to tell his parents that he does not want to attend college.

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Matthew goes to live with his biological father, leaving Mr Edwards feeling rejected and lonely. With Jonathan Hall Kovacs and Victor French

programme.title: Little House: Look Back to Yesterday (1983)
programme.desc: Albert falls terminally ill with leukaemia, and decides to see out his days in Walnut Grove. Laura, however, is in denial that her brother will soon die. Meanwhile, the school children prepare for their traditional climb of the mountain. Sequel to the popular TV drama, starring Melissa Gilbert, Matthew Labyorteaux and Victor French

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: A hailstorm leaves the Ingalls familys crops in ruin. To recoup the money, Charles and some friendly neighbours - including a light-hearted Englishman - work in a dangerous railroad blasting job. The Englishman, who is employed as a powder-monkey brings both cheer and eventually tragedy to Charles. Caroline, meanwhile, rounds up the farmers wives to salvage whats left of the crops, despite the pessimism that threatens their effort

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: While in Mankato, Charles encounters a drunken Mr Edwards in the midst of a bar fight and brings him to Walnut Grove. To rehabilitate him, he gets him a job at Hansens Mill, and Caroline tries to set him up with widow Grace Snider

programme.title: Little House on the Prairie
programme.desc: Laura has a crush on a new boy in school named Johnny Johnson. He, however, is interested in Mary, who finds no interest in him. Laura believes Mary is trying to steal him from her, and they fight about it. Charles teaches Laura that one day, a boy will be interested in her too

programme.title: The Ruth Rendell Mysteries
programme.desc: An accountant has a big win on the lottery and thinks all his problems are over, but it is not long before his change of fortune throws his life into more turmoil than he could ever have imagined. Having fallen for the woman of his dreams, the millionaire finds himself at the centre of a menage a trois that ultimately ends in tragedy. Ruth Rendell mystery, starring Jerome Flynn, Sadie Frost, Nick Reding and Liz Smith

When the coach is set on fire, they take cover in a gully, and a drawn-out conflict ensues. Western, starring Dale Robertson, Linda Darnell, John Lund and Ward Bond

programme.desc: A white man raised by the Sioux after his family were killed by Crow warriors finds his loyalties tested in later life. Western, starring Charlton Heston, Susan Morrow and Peter Hansen

programme.desc: Legendary American showman Phineas T Barnum designs a space rocket, which he hopes will take him to the moon, but his scheme is threatened when two crooks get wind of his plan and decide to sabotage the craft. Sci-fi comedy, starring Terry-Thomas, Lionel Jeffries, Burl Ives, Gert Frobe, Dennis Price and Hermione Gingold
