programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man is terrorised by a doll he tried to destroy. Guest starring Telly Savalas

programme.title: Safe House (2012)
programme.desc: A CIA agent stationed in South Africa is sent to question a rogue operative, who has been arrested years after betraying the agency, only to be attacked by mercenaries hired to capture the fugitive. As they flee for their lives, the interrogator has to contend with not only the enemies hunting them, but also the mind games of his prisoner. Thriller, with Denzel Washington and Ryan Reynolds

programme.title: Faster (2010)
programme.desc: A criminal is released from prison with revenge in mind. His brother was murdered while he was behind bars. He hunts down the men responsible, pursued by a cop on the verge of retirement and a ruthless hitman. Action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Billy Bob Thornton, Oliver Jackson-Cohen and Carla Gugino

programme.title: We Still Steal the Old Way (2017)
programme.desc: After their exploits in We Still Kill the Old Way, criminal outfit the Archer Gang encounters an old enemy when a daring heist ends with them behind bars, however that doesnt stop them attempting to break out an old friend. Prison drama, starring Ian Ogilvy, Billy Murray, Julian Glover and Lysette Anthony

programme.title: Freight (2010)
programme.desc: A Russian gang operates a people trafficking operation out of Leeds, but are drawn into conflict with a local gangster. When the Russians abduct his daughter, the gangster calls in an old friend from his SAS days to rescue the girl and bring down her kidnappers. Action thriller, starring Craig Fairbrass and Billy Murray

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Malibu Shark Attack (2009)
programme.desc: An underwater earthquake causes a tsunami that unleashes a pack of goblin sharks on an unsuspecting Malibu beach. Quick thinking from the local lifeguards ensures the area is cleared before the monsters strike, but a number of people remain abandoned in high water and must fight the creatures to reach dry land. Horror, starring Peta Wilson, Warren Christie and Chelan Simmons

programme.title: Legend Lowdown
programme.desc: Take a look at all the latest movies and series coming your way this month

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The gang joins a football team on a trip behind the Iron Curtain - to free an East German scientist. Action adventure, starring Robert Vaughn, Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The outbreak of a revolution interferes with the gangs plans to rescue three American agents from a Third World country. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: General Stockwell is kidnapped after the team steals a state-of-the-art Russian jet. George Peppard stars

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: Face plans to leave the A-Team, but gets involved in the rescue of a newswoman from a paranoid mob chief

programme.title: The A-Team
programme.desc: The crime-busting gang is given 24 hours to reunite a fugitive with his daughter, in the hope that he will return the favour by providing evidence against corrupt politicians. Action adventure, starring Mr T and George Peppard

programme.title: Triple Cross (1966)
programme.desc: Fact-based Second World War spy adventure about Eddie Chapman, a bank robber who became a British double agent in exchange for money and a full pardon. Following the German invasion of Jersey, Chapman offers to provide information to the Nazis, who are unaware his loyalties really lie with the British Secret Service. With Christopher Plummer, Trevor Howard, Yul Brynner, Romy Schneider and Claudine Auger

programme.title: Island of Terror (1966)
programme.desc: A pathologist investigates a series of gruesome deaths on a small island. He discovers that an experiment carried out by a group of doctors trying to find a cure for cancer has created a race of mutant creatures that suck the bones from the bodies of their human prey. Horror, starring Peter Cushing and Edward Judd

programme.title: The Fabulous Journey to the Centre of the Earth (1978)
programme.desc: A scientist leads an expedition deep under the Earths surface, discovering an underground prehistoric land inhabited by dinosaurs and other strange creatures. Fantasy adventure, starring Kenneth More and Pep Munne. In Spanish

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The Old Man in the Cave
programme.desc: A community survives an atomic war by heeding the advice of an old hermit. Guest starring James Coburn

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The greed of a crotchety old inventors niece leads to murder

programme.title: The Island (1980)
programme.desc: A band of modern-day pirates operating out of a Caribbean island preys on luxury yachts. A journalist and his son investigate why so many vessels go missing in the area, but end up kidnapped and forced to join the crew. Thriller, starring Michael Caine, David Warner, Frank Middlemass, Don Henderson, Dudley Sutton and Colin Jeavons

programme.title: Alien Nation (1988)
programme.desc: A race of aliens fleeing slavery seeks shelter on Earth. One of their number becomes a cop, and is paired with a bigoted human partner to investigate a murder. However, they soon find the case leads to a secret that has devastating repercussions for the extraterrestrial community. Sci-fi adventure, starring James Caan, Mandy Patinkin and Terence Stamp

programme.title: Hot Seat (2022)
programme.desc: A reformed hacker finds himself in the hot seat when he realises that hes just armed a bomb. Action adventure, starring Mel Gibson

programme.title: Daylight Robbery (2007)
programme.desc: A gang of crooks hatches a plan to steal millions of pounds in untraceable currency from a London exchange bank, using the world cup to provide an alibi. But the plan goes horribly wrong when the police lay siege to the bank, and the thieves are forced to take hostages. Crime thriller, starring Geoff Bell and Vas Blackwood

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: An 18-year-old is rushed in after suffering a cardiac arrest during a football game and 30-year-old Tom has a severe ankle injury after a head-on traffic collision. In the Minor Injuries department 23-year-old Phoebe has a damaged nose after tripping in the library

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: In Worcester, paramedics are called to reports of a man unconscious in the town centre. A friend says hes been taking drugs, so they quickly get him into the ambulance. A 27-stone man has lost the vision in one eye and has very high blood pressure. Getting him out of the house and into an ambulance requires specialist help and equipment

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: The stories of three mothers who have triumphed over extraordinary adversity. One was diagnosed with cervical cancer when she was 19, one has suffered the death of a child after he fell from scaffolding working as a bricklayer, and another faced the challenge of bringing up a child who needed extra care, and who has suffered potential injuries to his pelvis having been thrown off his motorbike at speed

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: An 18-year-old is rushed in after suffering a cardiac arrest during a football game and 30-year-old Tom has a severe ankle injury after a head-on traffic collision. In the Minor Injuries department 23-year-old Phoebe has a damaged nose after tripping in the library

programme.title: Food Unwrapped
programme.desc: The team revisits favourite investigations, including Kate Quiltons visit to the worlds largest producer of jelly beans to find out what goes into the sweets. Matt Tebbutt attempts to find out why tinned anchovies taste so salty, and Jimmy Doherty heads to a Mauritius distillery as he explores the secrets of rum

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Sailing fans Nicole and Lee are planning to move permanently to Aude in the south of France. With three children between them from previous relationships, theyre looking for a property with plenty of space for visitors. Jean Johansson shows the couple five properties for their maximum budget of £270,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jasmine Harman helps Fiona and David find their perfect holiday home in Cyprus on a budget of £100,000. As a former Royal Navy engineer who used to be based in Cyprus, David knows the island well, but Jasmine hopes she can find them the ideal spot

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Greg and Tina are searching for a holiday home in western Cyprus, which they plan to share with all their family. Greg has been visiting Cyprus for nearly 40 years, and after introducing Tina to the island, she has fallen in love with it too. Helping them to find the perfect place is property expert Leah Charles-King, who shows them the very best of what their £190,000 budget can buy

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition begins at the Castle Arms Inn in Snape, North Yorkshire, where owner Jill Chinnery hopes the charms of her 17th-century coaching inn will give her the edge

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers enjoy the great outdoors at Eden Valley Glamping in Cumbria, a site with a back-to-basics approach - but a dusty bathroom and damp duvets put a crimp in the guests stay

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week takes place at Fernie Castle in Letham, Fife, where owners Neil and Mary Blackburn hope to impress their guests with their traditional 15th century BandB

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests check in to the Cadillac Kustomz Hotel on the Isle of Bute, where the retro design proves popular but the Scottish-American breakfast seems to get lost in translation

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet up for a final showdown, as Jill from the Castle Arms Inn takes issue with her feedback - wanting to quiz Neil and Mary on their curtain comments in particular. Next, Liz and Dave hope the others will eat their words over the breakfast complaints they found hard to swallow at their Eden Valley Glamping site in Cumbria

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Receptionist Linzey hosts the first dinner party in Durham, where she hopes to woo her visitors with an evening of flirty fun and a date-night menu of food she loves to eat. Her guests are 48-year-old teacher Rob, 44-year-old events planner Kate, 25-year-old beach enthusiast Elliot and 33-year-old health worker Kenya

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Teacher Rob takes charge in Durham, hoping to get top marks with a range of dishes based on different school lessons. But theres a surprise for the group when a new face turns up

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Third to host in Durham is events planner and staunch vegan Kate, who is hoping to win with a Roaring Twenties theme and a strictly vegan menu. But will the meat eaters be left wanting or will Kates party planning skills see her schmooze her way to the top of the table?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Durham, the fourth host is recruitment consultant and ex-trampolining pro Matthew, who hopes to impress his guests with an Ibiza-themed party, where Spanish food and full-on clubbing are on the menu. It remains to be seen whether Matthew - or Matty to his friends - finds his food fiesta and spot of impromptu flips and stretches successfully put his guests in the mood

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final host in Durham is 33-year-old health worker and big-time party girl Kenya, whos hoping to impress her guests with an East African menu, complete with safari theme. Kenyas wild nature has provided many memorable moments throughout the week, and shes looking to take that energy into the kitchen to put on an evening to remember

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at the Star and Garter in Linlithgow, West Lothian, where guests have connectivity concerns as well as worries over the water supply in the morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals spend the night at Larch Green Lodges in the Renfrewshire village of Langbank on the banks of the River Clyde. The guests are wowed by the sweeping views of the estuary but cleanliness concerns and a black pudding blunder at breakfast lead to negative comments come feedback time

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals stay at the Distant Hills Guest House in the Scottish Highlands, where the scenic views prove popular and an afternoon of quad-biking send spirits soaring

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rival hoteliers final visit of the week is to Edinburgh bed-and-breakfast establishment 18 Craigmillar Park, run by Craig Bonnar. From the outset, the guests are impressed by ex-paratrooper Craigs in-room military precision. During the in-house whisky tasting experience, Craig reveals his passion for a dram. At breakfast, the hot stuff goes down handsomely, but the plastic packaged continental causes concern

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The final day of the competition sees the hosts meet for the last time, to find out what theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Shona and John of Larch Green Lodges are determined to flush out Dani and Camerons dirty remarks. Moving on to Distant Hills Guest House, Dani and Cameron want to get to the bottom of Craigs water woes, while Craig himself wants to clean up a filthy finding at his BandB 18 Craigmillar Park

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Stuart, whos 40, is admitted to hospital after being involved in a high-speed collision with multiple cyclists during a race, and a CT scan reveals that he is bleeding internally. Meanwhile, 83-year-old Elicia-Jean collapsed at home after experiencing dizziness, and doctors think she may have an infection

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. In paediatric AandE, it is hoped that 18-month-old Charlies urine test results will explain why he has been feeling unwell for five days, while 81-year-old Ronald prepares for a CT scan after suffering a suspected stroke that is affecting his speech

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: When a car collides with two children walking home from school, two ambulances, a doctor and a critical care paramedic are sent to the scene. Paramedics also treat a man whos having back-to-back epileptic seizures, and a four-month-old baby with a barking cough is finding it increasingly difficult to breathe

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a rare and unusual stomach condition thats left a patient in agony. On the night shift, a young man is intoxicated and passed out in the street. An elderly man has fallen at home and cant get back up, and a confused and disorientated woman has one of the highest blood pressure readings the paramedics have ever seen

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. In paediatric AandE, it is hoped that 18-month-old Charlies urine test results will explain why he has been feeling unwell for five days, while 81-year-old Ronald prepares for a CT scan after suffering a suspected stroke that is affecting his speech

programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Five holiday-hungry Brits jet off to the same popular holiday destination for a five-day getaway, with each traveller taking control of the groups activities for 24 hours. Were off to Benidorm for the competitions first week, where show singer Wyen splashes out on a luxury yacht, books herself a suite on the sly, and performs a self-penned song

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first in a week of dinner parties from in and around Bristol. Up first is Jade, who throws a festival-themed evening with its own drum and bass rave. Her guests are community football CEO Adam, nanny Sarah, 62-year-old property investor and developer Joe, and 26-year-old musician Jack

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host of the week is football fan Adam in Bristol who dedicates his dinner to his favourite sport, unfortunately his guests dont share his enthusiasm. Tensions at the table rise between Jade and Sarah leading to a red card from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week is dance enthusiast and property developer Joe who creates an evening dedicated to the happiness of holidaying with a taste of Dominican food for his guests. Will his Caribbean theme be paradise or purgatory?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jazz musician Jack puts on an evening of vintage couture, sophistication and class, and his rivals in and around Bristol embrace the theme. However, the hosts timings and temperature make it hard not to notice the pressure he has put himself under

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nanny Sarah is the last to host in Bristol, preparing an evening of childrens food presented in a sophisticated manner. The soiree kicks off with a promise of payback after Sarahs critique earlier in the week, and as the night develops, the atmosphere becomes more tense and awkward as the feedback comes thick and fast. However, that doesnt stop the host putting on a show that no one will forget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Welsh champion sausage-maker Steve and his wife Helen have travelled the world in search of the perfect holiday home and have decided that Torrox on the Costa del Sol is for them. Scarlette Douglas pulls out all the stops to show five properties within her budget of £95,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies jets off to Portugals Setúbal Peninsula to help house-hunters Tony and Hendrik from York find their dream holiday home. The couple, whove been married for three years and have two daughters, are looking for somewhere they can all enjoy as a family, for their maximum budget of £330,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Dance teacher Karen is joined by her sister Sheila and Jean Johansson as they search for a permanent home in Charente, southwest France, that she can also use as a yoga studio and gite business With a budget of £210,000, Jean shows the sisters five potential properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Laura Hamilton heads to the coastal town of Paralimni in eastern Cyprus to help Yvonne and Tony find their perfect property. Yvonne and Tony first visited Cyprus on their honeymoon 27 years ago and they immediately fell in love with the place. Theyve been back plenty of times since, but after a few tough years, have decided to seize every second they have and buy a holiday home for the whole family to enjoy. Within their budget of £80,000, Laura shows them five impressive properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Nick and Rose from Southampton are looking for a holiday home on the Caribbean island of Barbados. Their plan is to spend up to six months a year enjoying the tropical climate and golf facilities. Craig Rowe shows them the best of what their £550,000 budget can get with five impressive properties

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer meet Alex and Danny Moore in Preston, and offer the pair advice on whether they should renovate their home or put it on the market. Danny wants to do up the property and sell it on, but Alex has other ideas, and thinks the house is the perfect place for them to start a family

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help two sets of house-hunters looking for homes in the historic city of York. Kirstie helps first-time buyers Tom and Timna, who met at university, married soon after and are now expecting their first child. With the lease on their rental almost up, time is of the essence find them their family home. Phil is searching for Yorkshire-born Rich and Kirsty, who have been living it up in London but want to move back up North to be closer to their family - and to start their own

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The first destination is North Kingsfield Holiday Cottages in East Yorkshire, where a revelation over evening drinks leaves the guests all at sea

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The second visit of the week is to Crackin View Guest House in Northumberland. Owners Steve and Maria Turnbull reckon their scenic vista and homespun appeal will pip their rivals to the post

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The rivals arrive at the Domo Boutique Hotel in Oldbury near Birmingham, where owner Ali expects his luxury lodgings to wow his fellow competitors. Helen and Lauren are dazzled by the decor, but a caffeine conundrum leads to some trouble brewing

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guest house owners convene at the Crown Inn in Gayton, Norfolk, where owners Lisa and Neil Staples hope their historic setting and boutique-style rooms will garner praise. Once theyve checked in, Helen and Lauren make a critical observation about the cleanliness of the windows, while Ali and Serge are left feeling exposed in the bathroom. On a buggy ride across a wildlife reserve, the rivalry spills over into some raucous racing - but at drinks, its Neils chat-up lines that veer off track

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The hosts meet one last time to settle scores and discover what theyve been paid. First up is Helen Milner, and her daughter Lauren, but although they asked one pair to close off their curtain comments, its a surprising set of payments which leave them open-mouthed. Another host addresses why his guests werent full of beans - only for one pair to express some strong opinions about his breakfast. Off-colour feedback about one BandBs bedding leads to more frank exchanges. The guests dramatic discoveries surface, before the payments are revealed and the winner is finally announced

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: A patient has a nosebleed that wont stop, and is concerned that it could be linked to a recent bleed on the brain. Paramedics treat a woman who wakes up in the night having a heart attack. A patient with abdominal pain has lost a lot of blood and needs to go to hospital, while on the night shift, a drunk man who has collapsed in the street refuses medical help

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Nottinghams Queens Medical Centre, 87-year-old Joan is brought in after falling on a moving tram and cutting open the back of her head. Nineteen-year-old Rose faces life-changing injuries after a collision with a car and 13-year-old Prince has broken his leg in three places playing football

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Ten-year-old Henry is brought to Queens Medical Centre in Nottingham after being hit accidentally by a forklift truck driven by his dad. X-rays confirm that both his legs are broken. Nahum and Dean arrive by ambulance following a road traffic accident, and 94-year-old Pearl comes in after badly cutting her arm by trapping it in a lift

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called out to a woman who got tangled up in her dogs leads, leaving her lapsing in and out of consciousness on her 45th wedding anniversary. Meanwhile, a man is in severe pain with an umbilical hernia and a woman has a suspected seizure at work. The paramedics also attend a baby thats just been born, with the mother having to deliver her baby on the bathroom floor

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: At Nottinghams Queens Medical Centre, 87-year-old Joan is brought in after falling on a moving tram and cutting open the back of her head. Paramedics also treat a man whos having back-to-back epileptic seizures, and a four-month-old baby with a barking cough is finding it increasingly difficult to breathe

programme.title: 999: On the Front Line
programme.desc: Paramedics are called to a rare and unusual stomach condition thats left a patient in agony. On the night shift, a young man is intoxicated and passed out in the street. An elderly man has fallen at home and cant get back up, and a confused and disorientated woman has one of the highest blood pressure readings the paramedics have ever seen

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: New staff nurse Sophie attends to 22-year-old chef James, who accidentally stabbed himself in the leg while chopping tomatoes. During an eventful shift, she also uses chest compressions to keep alive another patient and helps 54-year-old Bernard, who was out cold for 10 minutes after falling and banging his head against a car. However, when his family arrives, it turns out he had been drinking

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Consultant Jacqui must act fast when severely underweight baby Jaziah is rushed into resus with breathing difficulties. programme.title: Strangers on a Plane
programme.desc: Five holiday-hungry Brits jet off to the same popular holiday destination for a five-day getaway, with each traveller taking control of the groups activities for 24 hours. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first in a week of dinner parties from in and around Bristol. Up first is Jade, who throws a festival-themed evening with its own drum and bass rave. programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The second host of the week is football fan Adam in Bristol who dedicates his dinner to his favourite sport, unfortunately his guests dont share his enthusiasm. Tensions at the table rise between Jade and Sarah leading to a red card from the host

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The third host of the week is dance enthusiast and property developer Joe who creates an evening dedicated to the happiness of holidaying with a taste of Dominican food for his guests. Will his Caribbean theme be paradise or purgatory?

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Jazz musician Jack puts on an evening of vintage couture, sophistication and class, and his rivals in and around Bristol embrace the theme. However, the hosts timings and temperature make it hard not to notice the pressure he has put himself under

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Nanny Sarah is the last to host in Bristol, preparing an evening of childrens food presented in a sophisticated manner. However, that doesnt stop the host putting on a show that no one will forget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Danni Menzies jets off to Portugals Setúbal Peninsula to help house-hunters Tony and Hendrik from York find their dream holiday home. programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Dance teacher Karen is joined by her sister Sheila and Jean Johansson as they search for a permanent home in Charente, southwest France, that she can also use as a yoga studio and gite business With a budget of £210,000, Jean shows the sisters five potential properties

programme.title: A Place in the Sun

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Four in a Bed

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Part one of two. Over 4,000 years ago, the ancient kingdom of Egypt, collapsed and disappeared. The mighty pharaohs, who had reigned supreme for more than seven centuries, lost control and the land was plunged into 150 years of chaos and civil war. In this documentary, a team of archaeologists examines the Tomb of the Warriors, a rare mass grave dating to the fall of the Old Kingdom, when political infighting and a changing climate brought down an empire

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour
programme.desc: Part two of two. The Tomb of the Warriors, near Luxor in southern Egypt, contains over 60 mummified bodies, all of which had suffered violent deaths. Though discovered in 1923 before being sealed, the tomb has only recently been investigated for what it can reveal of this lost world

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Egyptologist Joann Fletcher looks at the lives of ordinary Egyptian citizens 3,500 years ago. In the first of two programmes, she explores the conditions of their tightly packed houses, how they dressed and what they ate. Joann also examines their love of poetry, their enthusiasm for interior design and what it was like to work in the Valley of the Kings, where the pharaohs were entombed

programme.title: Ancient Egypt: Life and Death in the Valley of the Kings
programme.desc: Part two of two. Joann Fletcher investigates the Ancient Egyptian attitude to death, revealing that to them life was just a dress rehearsal for the perfect afterlife that they were trying to reach. Joann clambers into rarely visited tombs, explores a treasure trove of long-buried objects and examines mummies to discover just why they spent a fortune preparing for death - and what they hoped to find when they got there

programme.title: Immortal Egypt with Joann Fletcher
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Joann Fletcher explores the story of Ancient Egypt and begins with a search of the building blocks that made he civilisation so enduring. She discovers how its people changed from primitive farmers to pyramid builders in just a few centuries, and finds early evidence for Egypts gods and its obsession with death and the afterlife. She also reveals how the first writing was used to calculate taxes and examines Egypts first pyramid - one of the worlds earliest stone structures

programme.title: Immortal Egypt with Joann Fletcher
programme.desc: The professor explores one of Saqqaras last pyramid complexes to illustrate how Ancient Egypts Pyramid Age came to an end. A worsening climate combined with political upheaval, famine and economic difficulties to plunge the state into a dark era of civil war, with the land dividing into smaller city-states headed by ambitious small-town leaders. In an obscure tomb in Thebes, she uncovers the stories of warriors who fought in the bloody battle that would eventually lead to Egypts reunification, and reveals how settlers known as the Hyksos tried to infiltrate the fledgling nations government to seize the throne

programme.title: Immortal Egypt with Joann Fletcher
programme.desc: Joann explores the peak of ancient Egyptian civilisation by looking at the Colossi of Memnon, two massive stone statues depicting Pharaoh Amenhotep III, and examining the lives of the workers and artisans involved in the building of the Valley of the Kings. This golden age was threatened by the growing power of Karnaks priests, and Joann reveals how Tutankhamens early death was a chance for Egypt to start afresh and rewrite history, but was undermined by decades of state-sanctioned looting of the tombs

programme.title: Immortal Egypt with Joann Fletcher
programme.desc: The historian reveals hows Egypts enemies exploited a country weakened by internal strife, travelling south to Sudan to examine the story of the forgotten Nubian kings, who ruled Egypt from their southern homeland for a century, even building their own pyramids to bury their monarchs. She then explores how the next group of invaders the Saites took the tradition of mummification to new extremes by preserving millions of animals, before Alexander the Great came to Egypts rescue and founded the greatest city on Earth

programme.title: Alexandria: The Greatest City
programme.desc: Bettany Hughes examines the history of the ancient city, which was founded by Alexander the Great in 331 BC. Until its decline in the fourth and fifth centuries AD, it became the centre of the world of art and culture and an example of advanced civilisation

programme.title: Egypts Darkest Hour

Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: America the Bountiful

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. This edition featuring clips of people celebrating the arrival of a new tram in Wigan, a football match in Burnley, and a public swimming gala in Tynemouth, and film of suffragette Emily Wilding Davison colliding with the kings horse at the 1913 Epsom Derby

programme.title: America the Bountiful
programme.desc: Capri Cafaro joins a pheasant hunt and discovers South Dakotans? love for the state bird and samples a pheasant sandwich that can trace its origins back to the Second World War

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: Docudrama in which Dan Snow explores the political intrigues and family betrayals between Vikings, Anglo-Saxons and Normans that led to the Battle of Hastings. The first edition reveals how the death of Edward the Confessor without an heir triggered a bitter race to succeed him as king of England, with Earl Harold successfully taking the crown. However, William of Normandy believes the throne has been promised to him and decides to invade, while Viking king Harald Hardrada also fancies himself as monarch

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: As Dan Snows docudrama continues, King Harold has to take on two invasion forces. First, his brother Tostig attacks the south coast. He is repelled, but there is more to come. Later in the year, a vast Viking invasion force led by King Harald Hardrada of Norway lands in the north of England. Harold rushes to Stamford Bridge to fight for his kingdom and for his life

programme.title: 1066: A Year to Conquer England
programme.desc: After months trapped in a port in northern France, the winds finally change and Duke William leads his vast invasion fleet across the Channel. Catastrophically, King Harold is 300 miles away in the north, having defeated the Vikings. Harold rushes back south, gathers a new army, and heads to Hastings to take on this new invasion. The two armies will meet at Battle in Sussex on October 14, 1066, and the outcome will change the shape of England and Europe for ever. Dan Snow presents

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Part one of a two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving film footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. The first episode features footage of Queen Victorias state funeral in 1901 and a bicycle parade celebrating the coronation of the new king. The programme also examines life for people employed in the mining and cotton industries, as well as how an increase in leisure time led to the the popularity of seaside resorts soaring, with Blackpool leading the way

programme.title: Edwardian Britain in Colour
programme.desc: Conclusion of the two-part documentary in which social historians examine surviving footage of Britain in the early years of the 20th century. This edition featuring clips of people celebrating the arrival of a new tram in Wigan, a football match in Burnley, and a public swimming gala in Tynemouth, and film of suffragette Emily Wilding Davison colliding with the kings horse at the 1913 Epsom Derby

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including thousands of people attending a homecoming parade in Hull to celebrate local hero Amy Johnson, who at just 26 years old had become the first British woman to fly solo from Britain to Australia. Plus, the Jarrow unemployment protest of 1936, led by MP Ellen Wilkinson

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Colourised footage of films from the 1930s, including the abdication of King Edward VIII at a time when the nation needed stability the most and a top-secret conference between the prime minister and the Fuhrer. Plus, a fitness craze that saw women take to the great outdoors in their big knickers and blouses, and new prosperity in the south of Britain thanks to the Hoover factory

programme.title: Thirties in Colour: Countdown to War
programme.desc: Social historians and those with direct connections to the footage explore the last year before the Second World War officially began to reveal insights into child refugees and bomb attack drills

programme.title: Victorian Britain on Film
programme.desc: Documentary offering a unique window into a bygone era when a thrilling new invention, the motion picture camera, first captured a nation on film. Most of these films have been transformed by colourising them for the first time. They offer a rare portrait of a powerful and prosperous nation - and Empire - on the cusp of great change

programme.title: How Do They Do It?

programme.title: The Repair Shop
programme.desc: Jay Blades and his team of experts welcome James to the workshop who brings Dominic Chinea a 1960s lawnmower to repair. As a child James and his brother would visit their grandfather and use the machine to see who could mow the lawn the quickest before the whole family would play cricket on the grass. James thinks now is the right time to put his own son to work using his great grandfathers lawnmower. Brenton West gets a visit from Lyn who, as the secretary for the Welsh Schools Rugby Union Intermediate Group, brings him a trophy to bring back to its former glory. With almost one hundred silver plaques on dating back to 1904, the mahogany shield has a large crack in it and the decorative centre panel has lost its detail. Suzie Fletcher receives a visit from Deborah who asks her to repair her personalised leather belt that has held her jeans up for over 40 years. As a gift for her 16th birthday, the leather is now dry and splitting and needs a colour refresh

programme.title: Judge Rinders Crime Stories
programme.desc: The barrister examines the cases of Arash Ghorbani-Zarin, who was stabbed to death by his girlfriends brothers. Thames Valley Police led the investigation into Arashs murder and soon uncovered that his death was the result of a shocking honour killing. There is also a look at the case of Violet-Grace Youens, who died after being hit by a car driven at 80mph in a 30mph area, by a driver who had no licence or insurance and who ran from the scene

programme.title: Britains Deadliest Kids
programme.desc: The murder of 15-year-old Michael Moss, who was tortured to death by Mark McKeefrey, Allan Bentley and Graham Neary on playing fields in Liverpool in 1999. The trio were re-enacting a scene from Quentin Tarantino movie Reservoir Dogs during the grotesque attack

programme.title: Britains Deadliest Kids

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 1
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott hit the road again, winding each other up, cracking bad jokes and looking for exquisite antiques, beginning in north Wales. Raj also heads for a remote but stunning stretch of Welsh coastline to discover how the national language was brought close to extinction before becoming a defining feature of modern Wales

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 2
programme.desc: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott bid goodbye to Wales and say hello to Shropshire as their journey continues. Irita has her eye on a number of items, each one bigger than the last while Raj sets his sights on some coloured glass and rediscovers the object that kicked off his career in the antiques game

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 3
programme.desc: As they hit the halfway point in their trip, Irita Marriott and Raj Bisram meander through the Midlands where Iritas eye is caught by six silver goblets and Raj mistakes a silver candle snuffer for a Georgian toddy ladle

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 4
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott explore The Fens in search of treasure, ticking off five east of England counties in their trusty Vanden Plas Princess. As the competition gets down to the pointy end, they apply their business heads on but still cannot resist some shenanigans on the way. At the shops, Raj falls in love with the oldest thing hes ever found on the Road Trip, even if he cant pronounce whats written on the ticket. Irita discovers a secret door barred to the general public and discovers long-forgotten and very dusty treasures

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 5
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to the seaside in Lincolnshire, for their last chance to hit the shops before the final auction showdown. At the shops, Irita comes over all nostalgic as she stumbles across items from her childhood. She also gets her hands on some exquisite, enamelled artwork that she feels would benefit from being dismantled. Raj racks up a haul of potential purchases, but still finds time for a spot of puppetry. He also discovers the birthplace of the package holiday and meets the towns jovial mascot who has been pulling in the punters for over 100 years

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 3

programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 4

As the competition gets down to the pointy end, they apply their business heads on but still cannot resist some shenanigans on the way. At the shops, Raj falls in love with the oldest thing hes ever found on the Road Trip, even if he cant pronounce whats written on the ticket. programme.title: Antiques Road Trip
programme.sub-title: Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott - Day 5
programme.desc: Experts Raj Bisram and Irita Marriott head to the seaside in Lincolnshire, for their last chance to hit the shops before the final auction showdown. At the shops, Irita comes over all nostalgic as she stumbles across items from her childhood. She also gets her hands on some exquisite, enamelled artwork that she feels would benefit from being dismantled. Raj racks up a haul of potential purchases, but still finds time for a spot of puppetry. programme.desc: In the throes of his overstimulated, energy-poor midlife, a man fantasises about everything hed love to do in retirement, once he finally has the time. Comedy animation, with the voice of Domhnall Gleeson

programme.title: These Sacred Vows
programme.desc: As the week comes to a close and the day of the wedding arrives, everyone is adjusting to the new realities of their situations. At the ceremony, Father Vincents speech causes them to reflect on the promises theyve made to each other - only for the secrets of the previous week to bubble up to the surface. Comedy drama, starring Sarah Goldberg, Susan Stanley and Tom Vaughan Lawlor

programme.title: Malcolm X (1992)
programme.desc: Spike Lees political biopic, starring Denzel Washington as the controversial militant activist who led the fight for civil rights in America in the 1960s. Also starring Angela Bassett, Albert Hall, Delroy Lindo and Al Freeman Jnr

programme.title: Grantchester
programme.desc: Sidney takes Geordie to Johnny Johnsons London jazz club, hoping to leave their worries in Grantchester for the night, but the backstage murder of Johnnys sister Claudette puts paid to that. When Archie, the victims father and owner of the club, calls in a police officer pal to crack the case, Geordie immediately detects the copper is corrupt, while Sidney makes an important discovery about Claudette that she had kept hidden from all but those closest to her. As every lead seems to come back to Archies violent past, recriminations within the family begin to play out

programme.title: Patrick: A Slave to Ireland

Featuring re-enactments of the Saints journey, visuals of Ireland, narration from Ciarán Hinds and Ian Hart, as well as historical insights from leading scholars

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
Home of the Year
programme.desc: Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam visit three more shortlisted homes hoping for a shot at the title. In Kerry, they find a free-flowing, open plan house that mirrors the owners time travelling and working together, while in Dublin, they visit a renovation that created a blend of traditional and contemporary. Finally, in Cork they judge a detached new build that draws on natural materials, neutral colours and Scandinavian styling to create a bright and airy atmosphere

programme.title: Beyond Paradise
programme.desc: Humphrey and Marthas wedding day finally arrives, with the lavish affair organised by Anne - whose plans feel far grander than anything either of them actually wanted. Meanwhile, theres no rest for the Shipton Abbott team members who have to deal with the theft of a valuable museum piece and a nefarious pair of cyber criminals before they can join in the celebrations. With bride and groom running around and thieves running amok in Shipton Abbott, can the team wrap everything up in time to mark Humphrey and Marthas long-awaited union - or does fate have other plans? Death in Paradise spin-off, starring Kris Marshall, Sally Bretton and Barbara Flynn

programme.title: The Towering Inferno (1974)
programme.desc: The worlds tallest building goes up in flames during the opening celebrations. While Doug Roberts, the architect who designed the skyscraper, tries to save the party-goers trapped on the 135th floor, fire chief Michael OHallorhan leads a valiant attempt to fight the blaze. Irwin Allen and John Guillermin shared directing duties on this triple Oscar-winning disaster epic with an all-star cast including Paul Newman, Steve McQueen, Faye Dunaway, William Holden, Fred Astaire, Richard Chamberlain, Susan Blakely and Robert Vaughn

programme.title: MasterChef: The Professionals
programme.desc: Six chefs become four as finals week begins. The competitors have just one hour and 45 minutes to prepare and serve a dish showcasing their culinary skills and technical ability to impress the judges and go on to the final to cook for their professional heroes. At the end of this challenge, the judges will decide which four can continue in the competition. Next, the competitors are then given the opportunity to cook for their culinary heroes at the Chefs Table event at Londons Lanesborough Hotel, and the chefs have five hours to prepare one course each for this unique dinner. The pressure is on to execute every single element to perfection and send 20 identical, exquisitely presented dishes out to the guests

programme.title: Eva Paus Asian Kitchen

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Cash doubles down on his lie. Sonny snaps at Dana. Keri resorts to some of her old tricks

programme.title: The Wish Swap (2025)
programme.desc: Two strangers celebrating their birthdays in the same restaurant each make a wish at the same time - but each ends up having the others wish granted. Romantic fantasy, starring Emily Tennant and Jake Foy

programme.title: The Great British Sewing Bee
programme.desc: The quarter-final sees the five remaining sewers make garments inspired by divas past and present. For the Pattern Challenge, judges Patrick Grant and Esme Young take Tina Turners iconic fringed dress as inspiration and challenge the sewers to create their own versions with multiple layers of fringing. The Transformation Challenge envisages the diva on their day off, still fabulous but this time slipping into something more comfortable in animal print. Finally, in the Made to Measure, the sewers get to choose a stage outfit for their favourite diva. Hosted by Kiell Smith-Bynoe

programme.title: Animal Control
programme.desc: Emily and Victoria help Dr Summers with an alpaca birth, while Frank visit his dad Jimmy with Patel

programme.title: UCL Magazine Show
programme.desc: Including reviews of recent Champions League matches, a round-up of the latest news, plus interviews with leading players and coaches

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Wales v Italy (Kick-off 4.40pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo, and Stephen Ferris to present coverage of both teams fifth and final match of the championship, held at Principality Stadium. Wales were beaten 22-15 by Italy when the teams met at Stadio Olimpico in last years competition and are once again without a win in this seasons championship, having last won a Six Nations Contest in 2023. They will face an Italian side brimming with confidence after a historic 23-18 home win against England last time out. With commentary by Des Curran and Darren Cave

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: France v England (Kick-off 8.10pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo, and Stephen Ferris to present all the action from the final match of the championship, held at Stade de France. England claimed a narrow 26-25 victory over France at Allianz Stadium Twickenham in last years competition, but it was Les Bleus who went on to win the title. Frances Grand Slam hopes were dashed by Scotland last time out, but they are still very much in contention to retain the championship, while England have endured a disappointing campaign, winning just one of their four games. With commentary by Hugh Cahill and Bernard Jackma

programme.title: Beast (2022)
programme.desc: Recently widowed Nate Samuels and his teenage daughters Meredith and Norah find their holiday at a South African nature reserve turns into a nightmare when they are hunted by a huge rogue lion in the savanna. Action thriller, starring Idris Elba, Sharlto Copley, Leah Jeffries and Iyana Halley

programme.title: Herrhausen: The Banker and the Bomb
programme.desc: Cameras reveal how Herrhausen relentlessly pursued his grand vision, centralising Deutsche Banks core in Frankfurt and his push for digitalisation

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: Everything is on the line as A-Troupe band together to dance their best for the internationals re-adjudication. Their international dreams could come to an end right here

programme.desc: The stories making the headlines both at home and abroad during the past seven days

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Harper shuts Keri out. Sonny gets a reality check. Levi admits he needs a change

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Mali and Abigail assess their love. Leah makes an announcement. Will David have a change of heart?

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: Paul strives to create a good impression on Lucys parents, and Ewan makes an unwelcome discovery about his father. Donald looks forward to cruising the open road in the Morgan, while Isobel and Jess get their wires crossed when they pass a wedding shop

programme.title: Monarch of the Glen
programme.desc: A revelation by clan elder Sheila MacDonald has repercussions for the estates residents, allowing Donald to create mischief at Pauls expense. Molly returns from New Zealand, while Meg attempts to rekindle her relationship with Golly and Chester continues with his charm offensive on Isobel

programme.title: Live Six Nations Under-20s
programme.desc: Ireland v Scotland (Kick-off 3.15pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Donal Lenihan, Fiona Coghlan and Jonny Holland to present coverage of the match from the final round of fixtures, which takes place at Virgin Media Park in Cork

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation after Bart gets picked on at the school dance. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for targeting Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave the facility as a hero

programme.title: Smart Swarms
programme.desc: The work of scientists as they investigate the advantages of swarm intelligence, hoping to understand the organised chaos and intelligence of natural groups

programme.title: The Future of Nature
programme.desc: A look at how forest ecosystems reduce global carbon levels and effect climate, meeting the people working to improve biodiversity, saving keystone species and using Indigenous wisdom to rebuild and restore our forests

programme.title: Once Upon a Time in Tsavo
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary about the different creatures that call a waterhole home throughout the arid season in Kenya, including a family of elephants, a pair of hornbills, chameleons, bullfrogs, geese and dung beetles

programme.title: The Cleaner
programme.desc: Wicky heads to a stately home to clean up after the sad demise of an estate agent. Hes expecting to get a taste of how the other half live. What he finds is a strange time-warped Downton nightmare, a crumbling old pile ruled by a despotic housekeeper, Mrs Barton. Comedy, starring Greg Davies and Sharon Rooney

programme.title: Allianz League Sunday
programme.desc: Joanne Cantwell is joined by Enda McGinley and Paul Flynn for highlights and analysis of the weekends action, including Kerry v Mayo, and Dublin v Armagh in Allianz Football League Division One, plus Louth v Derry, and Cork v Kildare in Allianz Football League Division Two

programme.title: Life and Death Row
programme.desc: The sentencing trial of former Marine Patrick McDowell, who had pleaded guilty to the murder of deputy sheriff Joshua Moyers in 2021. The jury were asked to decide whether he should face life in prison without parole or the death penalty - and a new law in Florida meant that they were no longer required to be unanimous

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes
programme.desc: Hundreds of thousands of Allied troops land on five beaches along the Normandy coast - as told by those who were there in interviews lip-synced by actors. Powerful interviews with those who were there lead us through their story of the invasion as it unfolds. American soldiers on Omaha face a bloodbath, while Royal Marine commandos encounter chaos at Sword Beach. As night draws in, troops finally make it off the sand - but the threats ahead prove even greater

For the Pattern Challenge, judges Patrick Grant and Esme Young take Tina Turners iconic fringed dress as inspiration and challenge the sewers to create their own versions with multiple layers of fringing. The Transformation Challenge envisages the diva on their day off, still fabulous but this time slipping into something more comfortable in animal print. Finally, in the Made to Measure, the sewers get to choose a stage outfit for their favourite diva. Hosted by Kiell Smith-Bynoe

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: Wales v Italy (Kick-off 4.40pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo, and Stephen Ferris to present coverage of both teams fifth and final match of the championship, held at Principality Stadium. Wales were beaten 22-15 by Italy when the teams met at Stadio Olimpico in last years competition and are once again without a win in this seasons championship, having last won a Six Nations Contest in 2023. They will face an Italian side brimming with confidence after a historic 23-18 home win against England last time out. With commentary by Des Curran and Darren Cave

programme.title: Live Six Nations Rugby Union
programme.desc: France v England (Kick-off 8.10pm). Jacqui Hurley is joined by Jamie Heaslip, Simon Zebo, and Stephen Ferris to present all the action from the final match of the championship, held at Stade de France. England claimed a narrow 26-25 victory over France at Allianz Stadium Twickenham in last years competition, but it was Les Bleus who went on to win the title. Frances Grand Slam hopes were dashed by Scotland last time out, but they are still very much in contention to retain the championship, while England have endured a disappointing campaign, winning just one of their four games. With commentary by Hugh Cahill and Bernard Jackma

programme.title: D-Day: The Unheard Tapes

Proposition Joe brokers a meeting between Omar and Stringer, while an undercover operation has terrible consequences for one of the unit

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Bill breaks a taboo by protecting Sookie, who identified the man responsible for stealing from Fangtasia. Jason and Amy abduct a vampire to harvest his blood, and Tara consults with Miss Jeanette to cure her own problems. Supernatural drama, starring Anna Paquin and Stephen Moyer

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon Snow heads into the wildling camp to try to negotiate a peace with Mance Rayder, but an unexpected arrival changes the situation at the Wall, while Daenerys is forced to make a decision about the dragons in Meereen. Cersei demands that Tywin call off her engagement to Loras Tyrell, Bran learns more about his destiny, and Tyrion receives a visit from Jaime as he awaits his fate. Fantasy drama based on George RR Martins A Song of Ice and Fire series of novels, starring Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: At Castle Black, Jon Snow struggles to mediate between wildling leader Mance Rayder and Stannis Baratheon, while a mournful Cersei continues to worry about the future of her son Tommen in Kings Landing. Tyrion arrives in a new location and is presented with a fresh opportunity and Daenerys grapples with the politics of power in Meereen, as well as her tempestuous dragons. Starring Kit Harington, Lena Headey, Peter Dinklage and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: In Treatment
programme.desc: Walter attends his final session, and believes everything has worsened since his previous visit. He denies having a breakdown and reveals how his father never allowed him to to cry in front of his mother, even to mourn the death of his brother. Paul suggests he has created two versions of himself and that the real Walter does not wish to return to work, and the patient feels worried he has not lived his life for himself. Drama, starring John Mahoney and Gabriel Byrne

programme.title: The Guest Wing
programme.desc: At Northumberlands Chillingham Castle, Sir Humphrey Wakefield prepares to hand over the estate to his apprehensive son Maximilian. Hard-working staff at Carlton Towers in North Yorkshire get ready for the arrival of 120 caravan owners for the annual rally and dinner dance

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor returns to explore more of the worlds most luxurious hotels and begins in Miamis South Beach, home to some of the most hedonistic and extravagant establishments in America. At the Fontainebleau, he meets a man with eye-opening stories about Frank Sinatras regular visits and gets a shock when he discovers how much it costs to hire a booth in the night club. Richard also gatecrashes swimwear fashion week at the Raleigh Hotel, where he speaks to the event manager about the many celebrity parties he has organised

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor explores Berlin, visiting the arty Propeller Island City Lodge - a hotel where guests can fulfil their fantasies by sleeping in lion cages, coffins or rotating beds. At the Schlosshotel in affluent Grunewald, cabaret dancer Romy Haag talks to Richard about her affair with David Bowie, who stayed at the hotel while living in the German capital in the 1970s

programme.sub-title: The House of Black and White

Stannis has a proposal for Jon and an advisor tempts Daenerys. Fantasy drama, starring Maisie Williams, Lena Headey and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Kings Landing, Queen Margaery spends time with her new husband King Tommen. Elsewhere, fugitive Tyrion and Varys walk the Long Bridge of Volantis, and in Braavos, Arya sees the Many-Faced God. Fantasy drama, starring Natalie Dormer and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The militant arm of the Faith of the Seven grows more aggressive, Jaime and Bronn head south and Ellaria and the Sand Snakes vow vengeance

programme.title: Game of Thrones

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya continues her training at the House of Black and White, Jorah and Tyrion run into slavers and the Sand Snakes mount an attack. Fantasy, starring Peter Dinklage

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Jon prepares for conflict, Sansa tries to talk to Theon, and Brienne waits for a sign. Elsewhere, Jaime attempts to reconnect with his family

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Arya makes progress in her training, Sansa confronts an old friend, Cersei faces a struggle and Jon embarks on a journey. Fantasy drama, starring Lena Headey

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: In Westeros, Jon returns to the Wall from his controversial ranging mission, and Stannis faces a difficult decision. Meanwhile, in Braavos, Arya runs into a familiar face and Mace Tyrell visits the Iron Bank, and against her better judgement Daenerys hosts a traditional Meereenese celebration of athleticism. Fantasy drama, starring Kit Harington, Stephen Dillane, Maisie Williams and Emilia Clarke

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The High Sparrow and his militant followers appear to have made an indelible mark on Kings Landing as Cersei finds herself seeking forgiveness. Meanwhile, in the North, Stannis embarks on a gruelling march, and Jon is challenged, and across the Narrow Sea, Daenerys is surrounded by strangers as the fifth chapter of the hit fantasy drama draws to a close. Starring Kit Harington, Emilia Clarke, Lena Headey and Stephen Dillane

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fate of Jon Snow is revealed, Ramsay sends his dogs after Theon and Sansa, while Ellaria and the Sand Snakes make their move

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Bran trains with the Three-Eyed Raven, while in the north of Westeros at Castle Black, the Nights Watch stands behind Alliser Thorne. Fantasy drama, starring Isaac Hempstead-Wright and Owen Teale

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: A former teen idols life implodes when her phone is hacked and private images of her are leaked to the public. Comedy drama, starring Billie Piper

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: When no one believes her claim that the sex photos are fake, Suzie distracts herself from the drama and parties while her family life hangs in the balance. Starring Billie Piper

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Privacy is an issue, as Suzie finds hers invaded once again, but this time with the added fear of endangering her family, as her address is printed for the public to see

programme.title: I Hate Suzie
programme.desc: Suzie gives a disastrous interview and struggles to make peace with her own desires. Meanwhile, Naomi is in hard-core damage control mode. Suzie Pickles, a star on the wane, has her whole life upended when she is hacked and a photo of her emerges in an extremely compromising position. Drama, starring Billie Piper

programme.title: The Fear Index
programme.desc: A scientist-turned-Wall Street tycoon becomes the target of a plot to destroy the worlds financial markets. On the eve of the launch of his revolutionary AI, Dr Alex Hoffman is attacked, but not before receiving an antique book from an anonymous sender. Thriller, starring Josh Hartnett

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Mark processes revelations about his dad. Armond has a surprise in store for Shane, Tanya leans on Belinda for support, and Paula has a secret

programme.title: The White Lotus
programme.desc: Rachel is blindsided by an unexpected arrival, and Armonds renewed commitment to sobriety is put to the test. Meanwhile, Tanyas attention turns to an intriguing hotel guest

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: While Daenerys meets her future, Bran meets the past. Elsewhere, Tommen confronts the High Sparrow, and Arya continues her training. Starring Emilia Clarke, Maisie Williams and Isaac Hempstead-Wright

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: The fantasy drama continues as Tyrion strikes a deal, while Jorah and Daario undertake a difficult task as they seek to catch up with Daenerys. Back across the Narrow Sea, Jaime and Cersei try to improve their situation. Starring Peter Dinklage, Iain Glen, Nikolaj Coster-Waldau and Lena Headey

programme.title: Fish Town
programme.desc: Life in the Devon fishing port of Brixham. Spring is in the air, and the town is a hive of activity as skippers return their pleasure yachts to the water after winter in the dry dock, while the pressure is on for Brixham to look its best for the arrival of Princess Anne, who will officially open the new £20million fish market, and the start of the summer season

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: In this edition the actor explores the luxury hotels of Hong Kong. Home to more skyscrapers than any other city, he first checks in to the Mandarin in the financial district, before experiencing the Four Seasons, the only hotel with two Michelin three-star resturants, as well as the timeless Peninsula in Kowloon, which even provides a Rolls-Royce airport taxi service. He ends his stay at the Ritz-Carlton, home to the worlds highest swimming pool

programme.title: Richard E Grants Hotel Secrets
programme.desc: The actor heads to New Orleans and meets soul singer Irma Thomas at the Hotel de Monteleone, an establishment that was popular with writers such as Tennessee Williams, F Scott Fitzgerald and Ernest Hemingway. Richard speaks to Steel Magnolias author Robert Harling about the Soniat House, check into the supposedly haunted Hotel Maison de Ville and talks to burlesque dancer Chrissy Owens at the Roosevelt

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: An old foe returns to the great game, and Arya faces a difficult choice. Meanwhile, Gilly is given a chance to discover whether Lord Randyll Tarly lives up to his formidable reputation as she meets Sams family, and Jaime puts himself at odds with the Faith Militant as he faces off with the High Sparrow. Fantasy drama, starring Nikolaj Coster-Waldau, John Bradley, Hannah Murray and Maisie Williams

programme.title: Game of Thrones
programme.desc: Varys betrays his queen, and Daenerys brings her forces to Kings Landing as the explosive final battle for the Iron Throne begins. Starring Emilia Clarke, Kit Harington and Peter Dinklage

programme.title: A Clockwork Orange (1971)
programme.desc: Sadistic young gang leader Alex leads a carefree life indulging his love of rape, violence and classical music. When he is finally arrested, he is subjected to a sinister form of aversion therapy that brainwashes him into being physically unable to use violence. However, on his release, he finds friends and family have turned on him, while others seek to exploit him to further their political ends. Drama, starring Malcolm McDowell and Warren Clarke

programme.title: An Officer and a Gentleman (1982)
programme.desc: A Navy recruit undergoing officer training has an uneasy romance with a factory worker. He also attracts the attention of a tough, uncompromising sergeant, who sees his potential and is determined to push him to the limit. Romantic drama, starring Richard Gere, Debra Winger, Louis Gossett Jr, Robert Loggia, David Keith and David Caruso

programme.title: Gravity (2013)
programme.desc: Two astronauts are left stranded in orbit above the Earth when the debris from an exploding satellite destroys their shuttle. Left drifting in space with no way to contact mission control, they begin a perilous journey to reach the safety of a space station before their oxygen supply runs out. Thriller, starring Sandra Bullock and George Clooney

programme.title: Interstellar (2014)
programme.desc: In the future, Earth has been devastated by an environmental catastrophe and will soon become incapable of supporting human life. A former astronaut is recruited to carry out a desperate mission - piloting the last remaining spacecraft through a wormhole in search of another planet that can become humanitys new home. Sci-fi drama, starring Matthew McConaughey, Anne Hathaway and Michael Caine

programme.title: Inception (2010)
programme.desc: A talented thief uses hi-tech devices to enter other peoples dreams so he can steal their secrets. An industrialist hires him to perform a far more challenging job - to implant an idea into a corporate heirs mind, so he will think it is his own. However, the mission is compromised by the thiefs own troubled psyche. Christopher Nolans sci-fi thriller, starring Leonardo DiCaprio, Elliot Page, Joseph Gordon-Levitt and Tom Hardy

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: Jaws (1975)
programme.desc: A New England seaside towns tourist season is turned into a nightmare by a giant killer shark. The local police chiefs efforts to protect the public are thwarted by the greedy mayor, forcing him to join forces with a grizzled fisherman and an enthusiastic marine biologist to hunt and kill the monster predator. Steven Spielbergs blockbusting thriller, starring Roy Scheider, Richard Dreyfuss and Robert Shaw, with an Oscar-winning score by John Williams. The film also won Academy Awards for Best Sound and Best Film Editing

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power. He joins a fellowship of heroes to embark on a perilous quest to destroy the ring before it falls into the hands of its creator - a dark lord who needs it to regain his power and conquer the world. The first part of Peter Jacksons epic fantasy trilogy based on JRR Tolkiens novel, starring Elijah Wood, Ian McKellen, Viggo Mortensen, Sean Astin, Christopher Lee, Liv Tyler and Orlando Bloom

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers (2002)
programme.desc: Frodo and Sam continue their quest to destroy the all-powerful ring, bringing them face to face with the magical artefacts twisted former owner Gollum. Meanwhile, their allies prepare to make a desperate last stand against the vast armies of the corrupted wizard Saruman, who has declared war on a neighbouring kingdom. Part two of Peter Jacksons fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Sean Astin, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen, Billy Boyd, Dominic Monaghan, Andy Serkis and Christopher Lee

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King (2003)
programme.desc: As hobbits Frodo and Sam near the end of their journey into the dark lands of Mordor to destroy the One Ring, the evil Sauron unleashes the full might of his armies on Middle-earth. Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: Darkest Hour (2017)
programme.desc: May 1940. As the Nazis advance against Britains European allies, newly elected prime minister Winston Churchill must decide whether to leave neighbouring countries to their fate, by striking a peace deal with Hitler, or fight on against terrifying odds for the greater good. Double Oscar and Bafta-winning period drama, starring Gary Oldman, Lily James and Kristin Scott Thomas

programme.title: E.T.: The Extra-Terrestrial (1982)
programme.desc: A lonely boy befriends an alien who has been left stranded on Earth. The two develop a psychic connection as the boy helps the extraterrestrial to contact his own people and call for rescue. However, living on Earth starts to have a devastating effect on the visitors health, and a government operative is determined to capture him for study. Steven Spielbergs sci-fi fantasy, starring Henry Thomas, Drew Barrymore, Dee Wallace and Peter Coyote

programme.title: How to Train Your Dragon (2025)
programme.desc: On the isle of Berk, where Vikings and dragons have been enemies for generations, young warrior Hiccup breaks tradition by forming an unlikely bond with Toothless, a feared Night Fury. Live action fantasy adventure, starring Mason Thames, Nico Parker and Gerard Butler

programme.title: Jurassic Park (1993)
programme.desc: Scientists are given a sneak preview of a safari park inhabited by genetically engineered dinosaurs created by an eccentric tycoon. However, it all goes wrong when a greedy employee sabotages the security systems, allowing the prehistoric beasts to roam free and hunt the visitors. Steven Spielbergs action adventure, starring Sam Neill, Laura Dern, Jeff Goldblum, Richard Attenborough and Samuel L Jackson

programme.title: The Lord of the Rings: The Fellowship of the Ring (2001)
programme.desc: An unassuming hobbit is plunged into a battle against the forces of darkness when his uncle bequeaths him a magical ring of immense power.
