Meanwhile, Aragorn must fulfil his destiny of becoming king by leading his people into a climactic battle with the forces of darkness. Conclusion of the fantasy adventure trilogy, starring Elijah Wood, Viggo Mortensen, Ian McKellen and Sean Astin

programme.title: The Kings Speech (2010)
programme.desc: The younger son of George V struggles to cope with an uncontrollable stammer, prompting his wife to enlist the aid of an eccentric Australian speech therapist. The support and friendship of the doctor prove invaluable when a crisis places the repressed prince on the throne, just as the outbreak of the Second World War leaves the country in need of a strong king. Oscar-winning fact-based drama, starring Colin Firth, Geoffrey Rush, Helena Bonham Carter and Guy Pearce

programme.title: Anora (2024)
programme.desc: A sex worker marries the son of an oligarch, but his family in Russia try to get the marriage annulled. Writer/director Sean Bakers Oscar-winning romantic comedy, starring Mikey Madison, Paul Weissman and Lindsey Normington

programme.title: Goodfellas (1990)
programme.desc: An Irish-Italian boy from a poor neighbourhood grows up idolising the glamorous lifestyle of the Mafia. Taken under the wing of a mobster, he rises quickly in the world of organised crime. But he soon has to face the realities of murder and treachery, while his involvement in drug deals puts him at risk from both sides of the law. Martin Scorseses crime drama, starring Ray Liotta, Robert De Niro and an Oscar-winning Joe Pesci

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: King Ivory (2024)
programme.desc: Tulsa narcotics cop Layne West is locked in a battle with the citys criminal underworld. When his son becomes addicted to fentanyl, West teams up with his partner Ty and FBI agent Beatty to bring down those responsible. Thriller, starring James Badge Dale and Ben Foster

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Adulthood (2025)
programme.desc: Two siblings discover a dead body, long buried in their parents basement, sending them down a rabbit hole of crime and murder. Comedy drama, starring Josh Gadd, Kaya Scodelario and Billie Lourd, with Alex Winter who also directed

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.title: Materialists (2025)
programme.desc: Failed actress Lucy Mason is a star employee of the Adore matchmaking agency. She prefers the life of a singleton after her previous relationship with actor John imploded because of his precarious finances. At a clients wedding, Lucy meets the grooms brother, Harry, and politely rebuffs his amorous advances, suggesting he should enrol with Adore. Harry persists and Lucy agrees to go on a date, on condition that he signs up with the agency after their lunchtime liaison. Writer/director Celine Songs romantic comedy, starring Dakota Johnson, Chris Evans and Pedro Pascal

programme.title: Jurassic World: Rebirth (2025)
programme.desc: Profit-hungry pharmaceutical representative Martin Krebs contracts covert operations specialist Zora Bennett to assemble a crack team to infiltrate a forbidden island and collect the DNA of three key dinosaur species. Fantasy adventure, starring Scarlett Johansson, Mahershala Ali and Jonathan Bailey

programme.title: I Know What You Did Last Summer (2025)
programme.desc: A group of friends are terrorised by a stalker who knows about a gruesome secret from their past. Horror reboot, starring Madelyn Cline and Chase Sui Wonders

programme.title: Bring Her Back (2025)
programme.desc: Seventeen-year-old Andy and his visually impaired younger stepsister Piper discover their father dead in the shower. Single mother Laura agrees to take in Andy and Piper until the traumatised youngster comes of age and can apply for legal guardianship of his stepsister. Hoever, when events inside Lauras home spiral out of control, Andy fears he is losing his mind. Thriller, starring Billy Barratt, Sora Wong and Sally Hawkins

programme.title: The Gentleman (2025)
programme.desc: An elderly gentleman, haunted by a brutal murder, embarks on a quest for vengeance, navigating a complex web of emotions and moral dilemmas. Thriller, starring Ron Perlman

programme.title: One More Shot (2025)
programme.desc: On New Years Eve 1999, a young woman discovers a bottle of time travelling tequila, and each shot takes her back to the start of the night. Comedy, starring Emily Browning, Aisha Dee and Sean Keenan

programme.title: Pets on a Train (2025)
programme.desc: When a gang of animal crooks set out on what should be a simple con, theyre swept into a train robbery. It falls to Falcon, a small-time raccoon thief, and Rex, a by-the-book police dog, to put their differences aside and protect the passengers aboard a runaway high-speed train. Animated adventure, featuring the voices of Wyatt Bowen and Daniel Brochu

programme.title: Coyotes (2025)
programme.desc: Trapped in their Hollywood Hills home, a family fights for survival when caught between a raging wildfire and a pack of savage coyotes. Comedy thriller, starring Justin Long, Mila Harris and Brittany Allen

programme.title: Icefall (2025)
programme.desc: A game warden captures a poacher, only to discover hes aware of the location of a plane carrying millions of dollars frozen in a lake. Thriller, starring Joel Kinnaman, Bashar Rahal, Danny Huston, and in one of his last films, Graham Greene

programme.title: Sketch (2025)
programme.desc: When a young girls sketchbook slips into a mysterious pond, her drawings burst into life. As her once-quiet town spirals into chaos, she and her divided family must come together to track down the creatures they never meant to unleash. Writer/director Seth Worleys fantasy comedy, starring Tony Hale and DArcy Carden

programme.desc: Part two of two. The life and work of the legendary stand-up comic whose inspirational career spanned five decades. With insight from Chris Rock, Jerry Seinfeld and more

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who shot to fame in Grease and Saturday Night Fever and made a comeback with his Oscar-nominated role in Pulp Fiction

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the American actor, who starred in Wild at Heart, Raising Arizona, The Rock and Con Air, and won an Oscar for his performance in Leaving Las Vegas

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the English actor, who found fame in TV drama Brideshead Revisited before starring in films including The Mission, and Reversal of Fortune, for which he won an Oscar

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of Quentin Tarantino, whose films include Reservoir Dogs, Pulp Fiction, Django Unchained and Once Upon a Time in Hollywood

programme.title: Laurel and Hardy: Their Lives and Magic
programme.desc: Documentary shedding new light on the turbulent private lives of Stan Laurel and Oliver Hardy and the genuine friendship between them

programme.title: McEnroe
programme.desc: Set over the course of one night in New York, this documentary invites John McEnroe to reflect on his life and career. McEnroes children and wife Patty Smyth offer their personal insights, enriched with intimate home video footage and previously unseen archive material from big matches

programme.title: The Apollo
programme.desc: Documentary exploring the history of the Harlem venue, with archive footage of performances by Aretha Franklin, Diana Ross, Stevie Wonder, Jimi Hendrix and Pharrell Williams

programme.title: Faye
programme.desc: The life and career of actress Faye Dunaway, who talks about her bipolar disorder diagnosis and discusses her reputation for being difficult to work with

programme.title: My Icon
programme.desc: British tennis star Heather Watson discusses the individuals who have inspired her over the course of her life

programme.title: Elizabeth Taylor: The Lost Tapes
programme.desc: A profile of the actress told through audio tapes discovered in the archive of journalist Richard Meryman, revealing the complex inner life and vulnerability of the star

programme.title: Im Chevy Chase and Youre Not
programme.desc: Chevy Chase was a cast member on the inaugural series of Saturday Night Live and he built on that success to star in numerous Hollywood comedies and host the Academy Awards. He played hapless father Clark Griswold in the National Lampoon films and ran amok in pictures including Caddyshack, Spies Like Us, Fletch and Three Amigos. Two-time Emmy Award winner Marina Zenovich directs an authorised feature-length documentary portrait of Chase, which includes rare and intimate home movies and archive footage. Chase and his family share memories directly to camera, enriched with contributions from friends and collaborators including Dan Aykroyd, Beverly DAngelo, Goldie Hawn, Lorne Michaels, Ryan Reynolds and Martin Short.

programme.title: Robin Williams: Come Inside My Mind (2018)
programme.desc: An intimate portrait of the life and work of the beloved comedian and actor, Robin Williams, featuring previously unseen footage and interviews with those closest to him

programme.title: I Am Richard Pryor
programme.desc: Documentary reflecting on the highs and lows of the comedian and actors life, featuring interviews with Mike Epps, Tiffany Haddish and his widow Jennifer Lee

programme.title: Meth Storm
programme.desc: An examination of the impact that methamphetamine addiction has in a rural Arkansas community, following police as they struggle to deal with the devastation this drug causes

programme.title: Rock and a Hard Place (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary following Dwayne Johnson as he observes incarcerated young people who are granted a second chance through a one-of-a-kind boot camp programme

programme.title: My Icon
programme.sub-title: My Icon: Kate And Helen Richardson-Walsh
programme.desc: The Great Britain hockey stars talk about their idols

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: The life and work of British director J Lee Thompson, whose films include Yield to the Night, Ice Cold in Alex, Cape Fear and The Guns of Navarone

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: A profile of the actress and screenwriter, who won an Oscar for her role in Howards End as well as one for writing the screenplay for Sense and Sensibility

programme.title: Discovering Film
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who shot to fame in Grease and Saturday Night Fever and made a comeback with his Oscar-nominated role in Pulp Fiction

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the career of English director Stephen Frears, whose films include My Beautiful Laundrette, Dangerous Liaisons, The Grifters, High Fidelity, The Queen and Philomena

programme.title: The Directors
programme.desc: A look at the life and career of John Carpenter, known for his cult classics such as Dark Star, The Thing and Halloween

programme.title: The Fog of War (2003)
programme.desc: Former US Secretary of Defense Robert McNamara looks back over his career, explaining why, after initially supporting the decision to go to war in Vietnam, he eventually chose to speak out against the conflict - a decision that cost him his position. Documentary by acclaimed film-maker Errol Morris

programme.title: Man on Wire (2008)
programme.desc: Oscar-winning documentary about French street performer Philippe Petit. In 1974 he undertook a daring 45-minute tightrope walk and acrobatic routine on a wire stretched between the two towers of the World Trade Centre. Featuring re-creations of his earlier stunts at Pariss Notre Dame cathedral and Sydney Harbour Bridge

programme.title: Love Means Zero (2017)
programme.desc: Documentary about famed tennis coach Nick Bollettieri, who guided the likes of Jim Courier, Monica Seles and Andre Agassi to glory, but his success came at a terrible personal cost

programme.title: Rorys 2025
programme.desc: A look at a momentous year for golfer Rory McIlroy, who completed a career Grand Slam when he finally ended his wait for an illustrious Green Jacket at the US Masters

programme.title: I Am Steve McQueen
programme.desc: The life and career of the American actor, who starred in The Thomas Crown Affair, The Getaway, Papillon, The Magnificent Seven, The Great Escape and The Towering Inferno. Featuring contributions by his son Chad, grandson Steven and granddaughter Molly, as well as ex-wives Neile Adams McQueen and Ali MacGraw and widow Barbara Minty McQueen

programme.title: Spielberg
programme.desc: Susan Lacys feature-length documentary examines director Steven Spielbergs career in depth, revealing how his experiences fed his work and changed it over time. The film also includes insights from members of Spielbergs family, as well as friends and colleagues, and behind-the-scenes footage from many of his milestone films

programme.title: George Carlins American Dream
programme.desc: Part one of two. The life and work of the legendary stand-up comic whose inspirational career spanned five decades. With insight from Chris Rock, Jerry Seinfeld and more

programme.title: George Carlins American Dream
programme.desc: Part two of two. The life and work of the legendary stand-up comic whose inspirational career spanned five decades. With insight from Chris Rock, Jerry Seinfeld and more

programme.title: Between the World and Me
programme.desc: Poetic adaptation of Ta-Nehisi Coates bestseller, recounting the authors experiences growing up in Baltimores inner city and his fear of violence against the Black community

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Suggestions of cover-ups over the fact extraterrestrials with a superior knowledge of science and engineering landed on Earth thousands of years ago. In 1980, a man received a code after touching an alien spaceship. After the sequence was translated, he was told never to speak of the incident again

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Nations all over the world are rumoured to have found metal debris from UFO crashes. This edition investigates these alleged wreckages

programme.title: Alien Files: Unsealed
programme.desc: Reported accounts of genuine alien encounters, with specific regard to the so-called flying saucer, which has become synonymous with UFO terror

programme.title: Walking Through History
programme.desc: Tony Robinson heads to Guernsey and Jersey to tell the story of the islands surrender to the Nazis during the Second World War. In Guernsey, he hears of the first bombing raid that heralded the German troops arrival and sees the spot where the first-ever British commando landed in secret, only to see the planned revenge raid fail spectacularly. A ferry then takes him on to Jersey, where he finds almost all of its beaches have a bunker or a machine gun post left over from the conflict

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Examining the execution of German spies captured in the two world wars. Theres a profile of suffragette Leonora Cohen, who took aim at the crown jewels to publicise her cause. Theres a look back to 2014, when the Tower hosted a display of nearly 900,000 ceramic poppies in the moat for Remembrance Day. In the Royal Armouries after dark, curator Bridget examines a telling reminder of the horrors of war. Plus, another new recruit joins the Beefeaters

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: American couple and civil rights activists Betty and Barney Hill, who claimed they were abducted by extraterrestrials in a rural area of New Hampshire in September 1961. What really happened to the hills that night? Was this a real case of aliens among us or a couple just looking for attention?

programme.title: Worlds Most Unexplained
programme.desc: Broadhaven is a sleepy community in south-west Wales, but since the late 1970s it has made headlines for being the UFO capital of Europe. In 1977, schoolchildren spotted a cigar-shaped aircraft. The sighting transforms the quiet seaside town into a UFO hot spot

programme.title: Rust Valley Restorers
programme.desc: Mike overhauls a 1955 Belair Wagon in hopes of turning a quick profit, while Avery takes on an ambitious restoration. Plus, Mikes betting streak continues

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate remote ruins, mysterious caves and legendary mountain portals, asking if these alleged stargates have brought ancient aliens to Earth

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the belief that gifted children with strange abilities and great knowledge may have been born from ancient aliens

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Veterans and historians tell the story of the Thai-Burma railway and the countless prisoners of war and slave labourers who died building it

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The story of the Great Locomotive Chase - an attempt by northern spies to steal steam locomotive The General during the American Civil War

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: From the trench to the home-front hospital, a medical historian retraces the train journey made by wounded soldiers during the Second World War. Documentary series exploring the role of trains in the major conflicts of the past 150 years

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Documentary going behind the scenes at the castle and exploring its 900 years of history. The first episode focuses on the iconic Yeoman Warders, or Beefeaters, following their daily routine and the appointment of a new Chief Beefeater. Plus, a look at the towers origins in the reign of William the Conqueror and a new exhibition dedicated to the infamous story of the princes in the tower

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: The latest recruit to join the team of 37 beefeaters begins his career with some testing exams. Chris must learn the extensive history of the Tower by heart, a word-for-word knowledge which he will be tested on by the governor before being let loose alone on the 100,000 visitors who come to the Tower every week. Plus, chief curator Tracy Borman turns her attention to the time of Henry VIII, when the Tower gained its notorious reputation for imprisonment and execution, revealing the history of Anne Boleyn within the walls

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do the Brits Win Every War?
programme.desc: The presenter is joined by Bruno Tonioli to look at key battle tactics during the Roman Invasion. The pair contemplate the physical diffixcult of invasion - such as wading through the waves in armour - and examine the power struggle the Celts went through to hold onto their identity, as well as the complexity of firing a catapult

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate remote ruins, mysterious caves and legendary mountain portals, asking if these alleged stargates have brought ancient aliens to Earth

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the belief that gifted children with strange abilities and great knowledge may have been born from ancient aliens

programme.title: The Lost Women Spies
programme.desc: The story of Britains first female agents sent to the front line during the Second World War and spymistress Vera Atkins, who led them. In the tumult of the conflict, French Resistance fighters sought aid from Britains Special Operations Executive (SOE) against Nazi occupation. Led by Romanian-born Atkins, SOE enlisted female agents including Odette Sansom and Noor Inayat Khan to take the fight to the Germans. As tensions soared, Noor navigated occupied France, while Atkins grappled with tough decisions. She and her team raced against time to safeguard SOEs mission, braving sacrifices for victory

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: As Hitler rose to power, Heinrich Himmler and the SS were convinced the legendary continent Atlantis existed. From an ancient city to rock carvings in Sweden, the Ahnenerbe - Nazi Germanys secret team of elite scholars and archaeologists - searched for its whereabouts

programme.title: WWIIs Most Daring Raids
programme.desc: The efforts of Norwegian resistance fighters to return to their invaded homeland to carry out a daring mission to raid and destroy a hydroelectric plant where the Germans were stockpiling a chemical needed for nuclear weapons research

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: A look at the legend of Thor, asking historians whether they believe in the Norse protector god following new discoveries

programme.title: Clash of the Gods
programme.desc: Exploring the story of Beowulf, the Anglo-Saxon worlds most famous warrior, questioning whether the mythological hero could have been based on a real person

programme.title: The Sound and the Fury
programme.desc: In 1943, Germany fell at Stalingrad, its first major defeat. In the Pacific, Japan lost momentum after the US won at Guadalcanal

programme.title: WWII Battles in Colour
programme.desc: Gripping real life stories - when the fate of nations hung in the balance - are brought to life in never-before-seen colourised battle footage. This instalment illustrates life and death on the battlefield of El Alamein and life behind the lines in the north African desert

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts investigate remote ruins, mysterious caves and legendary mountain portals, asking if these alleged stargates have brought ancient aliens to Earth

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts examine the belief that gifted children with strange abilities and great knowledge may have been born from ancient aliens

programme.title: The Nostradamus Effect
programme.desc: Examining the plausibility of apocalyptic prophecies throughout history. This edition focuses on Isaac Newtons obsession with alchemy and biblical prophecies

programme.title: The Nostradamus Effect
programme.desc: In 1947, ancient scrolls were discovered in desert caves near the Dead Sea. One of them spells out - in chilling detail - a future apocalyptic war. This documentary considers the plausibility of such prophecies

programme.title: The Abyss: Rise and Fall of the Nazis
programme.desc: Hitlers government was firmly in the saddle in October 1934 and its anti-Jewish policy was supported by millions of Germans. Openly and publicly, Jews were discriminated against, disenfranchised, and persecuted. The indifference of many countries towards those Jewish refugees forced to leave Germany was evident

programme.title: Strangest Things
programme.sub-title: The Skull That Changed Science, The Bat Bomb and the Stone Age Multitool
programme.desc: A trip to Harvard Universitys Warren Anatomical Museum, where in a display case is one of the most astonishing objects in medical science - the shattered skull of a 19th-century American railway worker

programme.title: The Secret Nazi Expeditions
programme.desc: There is power in the debate of the true origins of humanity and it became the fixation of a nefarious power as Heinrich Himmler, leader of the Nazis SS, when he turned his attention to proving the Paleolithic past of Germanys Aryan race

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Across the world, there are stories of treasures that have been lost for centuries. This programme considers that these ancient relics have been hidden by extraterrestrials

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts question what probes on Mars may have found over the past 40 years, asking if Nasa could be hiding proof of life on the Red Planet from the public

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: Exploring how Lawrence of Arabia used guerilla warfare against the Ottoman Empires railways. Plus, two secrets hidden under New Yorks Grand Central Terminal - President Roosevelts personal train that brought him secretly into the city, and a M42 generator that it is claimed Nazi spies tried to destroy

programme.title: Combat Trains
programme.desc: The astonishing accounts of four railway journeys that changed history, including the perilous expedition that made a young Winston Churchill world famous

programme.title: Commando Missions
programme.desc: Musketoon Operation, a daring, small-scale commando raid on a German-held electricity generating station at Glomfjord in Norway, carried out by British and Norwegian commandos in September 1942. The mission involved a submarine crossing, an overland route and the destruction of the power plant

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: Queen Boudicas Revolt: The Battle of Watling Street
programme.desc: Military combat specialists Karl Ude-Martinez and Kevin Hicks investigate the British uprising against the Roman army, examining how swords, spears and body armour were developed. Plus, how battlefield wounds were treated on the frontlines

programme.title: Instruments of Death
programme.sub-title: The Napoleonic Wars: The Battle of Waterloo 1815
programme.desc: Kevin Hicks and Karl Ude-Martinez test a cannon, grenade and Brown Bess musket as they explore what it was like to face a Napoleonic charge

programme.title: Al Murray: Why Do the Brits Win Every War?
programme.desc: Al faces up to the richest nation on Earth to discover how the former British colony of America somehow slipped through its fingers. Joining him to fight for his nations honour is comedian Reginald D Hunter. Together, they explore how the frontiersmen of America used guerrilla tactics to outwit the British redcoats, how the most effective spy for the American army was a slave and turn their hands to firing the rockets that set fire to the White House

programme.title: Ancient Aliens

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Experts question what probes on Mars may have found over the past 40 years, asking if Nasa could be hiding proof of life on the Red Planet from the public

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Examining what would happen to the food industry in mankinds absence, with supermarkets becoming overrun by rodents and insects, and some foods lasting for ever

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Examining how a huge force of water would affect an unpopulated planet, with the Sydney Opera House collapsing and famous paintings being destroyed

programme.title: Life After People
programme.desc: Discovering the fate of the holiday industry in a post-apocalyptic world, with luxury resorts and cruise ships falling apart

programme.title: Behind History
programme.desc: A look at some of the most notable catastrophes in history, from the Hindenburg disaster to the Wall Street Crash and Chinas Cultural Revolution

programme.title: Forbidden History
programme.sub-title: The Secrets of the Devils Bible
programme.desc: The Codex Gigas, also known as the Devils Bible, is a giant medieval tome that has evoked fear for centuries and believed to contain a malevolent power. Experts investigate its legendary secrets and uncover the mystery behind its author Narrated by Jamie Theakston

programme.title: Secrets in the Dark
programme.desc: Documentary shedding light on unusual discoveries made in the darkest places on Earth. The fate of Pharaoh Ramses III has been clouded by rumours of a family plot against him. This film explores the tomb and uncovers evidence to support this

programme.title: Royal Autopsy
programme.desc: Professor Alice Roberts revisits the death of Mary I, also known as Bloody Mary. She was the daughter of Henry VIII and Catherine of Aragon, who experienced phantom pregnancies in her desperation for a child and heir. Forensic pathologist Dr Brett Lockyer helps paint in the detail

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Across the world, there are stories of treasures that have been lost for centuries. This programme considers that these ancient relics have been hidden by extraterrestrials

programme.title: Dark Marvels: Killing Machines
programme.desc: An exploration into the dark art of spy-craft, from the frankenkitty to the umbrella gun, reveals the deadliest spy weapons deployed to gather information and assassinate enemies

programme.title: Inside the Tower of London
programme.desc: Cameras follow Chris, the ancient structures Raven Master, and General Nicholas Houghton, former Chief of Defence staff and current Constable of the Tower. Plus, a look at the original document which reveals how brutally Guy Fawkes was tortured

programme.title: Cracking the Code
programme.sub-title: The Code That Won the Great War
programme.desc: How an encrypted German telegram offered the key to saving Britain in its darkest hour. A team of geniuses set about decoding the message to help win the Great War

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: Stories of UFO sightings, abductions and other paranormal events reported in the Southern Hemisphere. This episode focuses on Queenslands tropical coast where the rainforest meets the Great Barrier Reef. From flying saucers landing in lush banana plantations to UFO encounters in Queenslands sugar cane fields, the programme reports incredible stories from first-hand witnesses

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.sub-title: New Zealand and the Bass Strait
programme.desc: Untold stories of UFO sightings, abductions, and other paranormal events. The Bass Strait is a treacherous stretch of water that separates Tasmania from the Australian mainland. This episode documents the disappearance of pilot Frederick Valentich and his Cessna in the region. His last transmission gave a disturbing account of what the young pilot experienced

programme.title: Close Encounters Down Under
programme.desc: A visit to Queenslands farming country, where lush rain-drenched crops meet the Great Barrier Reef. UFO activity in the region has led to the suggestion as to whether there might be a link between water and such sightings

programme.title: Ancient Aliens: Origins
programme.desc: Sightings of Bigfoot, the Loch Ness Monster and reptilian beings continue, with their bizarre forms and behaviours eerily echoing ancient descriptions

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: A customer walks into the pawn shop with a Tommy Boy poster signed by Chris Farley. Meanwhile, Rick tries not to slip up when making a deal on a pair of snowshoes

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Marty embarks on a search for a bull moose that has mysteriously vanished into the thick brush. The tension builds as he faces the unpredictability of nature in his quest for the elusive animal. Meanwhile, Mike is on a race against time to pack out meat from a bull elk before scavengers, including brown bears, take their share. His efforts highlight the urgency and skill required to make the most of each hunt. Meanwhile, Lauro and Neil set out on an exciting journey with their raft, marking its maiden voyage

programme.title: Mountain Men
programme.desc: Lauro travels north of the Arctic Circle with his team of sled dogs to hunt caribou. Daniel rebuilds an oldfloating cabin using driftwood logs and employing the power of tides. Jake takes out a coyote threatening the livestock on a remote ranch

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Its all in the family in Moreno Valley, as Emily brings along her cowboy husband. Ivy is displeased at Marys fraternisation with the auctioneer, and takes it out on her later. Meanwhile, Kenny looks for anything in his locker that can wash off that storage scent

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: The Vegas ladies show up in Bourgie Brea, and find the place fascinating. Mary decides to deal with her storage stress by introducing a bit of yoga into her routine. programme.title: Unsung Heroes of Waterloo
programme.desc: Experts look at the uncredited heroes of the battle of Waterloo

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the north of Britain, where finds include Scottish man-made islands that help paint a picture of Stone Age tech and evidence for the first Roman siege in the UK. Theres also a look at Lindisfarne, which was violently sacked by the Vikings 1,000 years ago

programme.title: Digging for Britain
programme.desc: Alice Roberts visits archaeological digs in the east of Britain, including new discoveries at a perfectly preserved 3,000-year-old village in Cambridgeshire. She also visits the theatre where Shakespeare premiered Romeo and Juliet and the location of the Battle of Barnet

programme.title: Britains X Files
programme.desc: How two cousins produced photographs of fairies that enchanted the world, until decades later, their trick was exposed

programme.title: Great British Castle Rescue
programme.desc: Rick Edwards takes an aerial and up-close view of some of the UKs most awe-inspiring castles. Beginning at Fyvie Castle in Scotland, Rick meets Annie Robertson, who faces the task of saving the childhood home of Charles I from collapse

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: Documentary charting the design, service and demise of some of the worlds greatest ocean liners. The Normandie was the most expensive and extravagant ocean liner ever built. A symbol of French national pride adored by the super wealthy, her designer was in fact a poor but brilliant Russian immigrant. His radical hull design made the Normandie the fastest liner on the Atlantic. However, when the United States entered the Second World War, the Normandie was seized by the Americans for use as a troopship. However, during the hurried works to convert the luxury liner for war duties, a devastating fire broke out onboard

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost Liners
programme.desc: Floating palace the Queen Elizabeth became part of a cunning plan by the British government to help defeat Hitler. Though instrumental in helping turn the tide of the war, the treasured vessel came to an undignified end in Hong Kong Harbour after catching fire while undergoing refurbishment

programme.title: Mengele Unveiled
programme.desc: An analysis of the life of German officer and physician Josef Mengele, exploring his youth and studies, his adherence to Nazism, the inhumane experiments conducted at Auschwitz and the connection between Nazism and the German academic system

programme.sub-title: Auschwitz - Unveiling the Angel of Death
programme.desc: An analysis of the life of German officer and physician Josef Mengele, exploring his youth and studies, his adherence to Nazism, the inhumane experiments conducted at Auschwitz and the connection between Nazism and the German academic system

programme.title: Mengele Unveiled
programme.desc: An analysis of the life of German officer and physician Josef Mengele, exploring his youth and studies, his adherence to Nazism, the inhumane experiments conducted at Auschwitz and the connection between Nazism and the German academic system. programme.title: Killer Kings

programme.title: Killer Kings
programme.desc: The Roman Emperor Caligula, also known as Gaius, exploring his brief but brutal reign from AD 37 to 41, highlighting his initial popular policies - cutting taxes and pardoning exiles - which were followed by a descent into madness and tyrannical behaviour. programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist and film-maker explores the many varieties of plant life housed at the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, and explains what they reveal about the natural world and the development of life on Earth. He begins inside the establishments Palm House, whose climate has been engineered to simulate conditions found in rainforests, charting the evolution of plants that grow in the worlds wettest regions and investigating how flowering plants spread across the globe so rapidly

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist explores how the plants at Kew Gardens change through the seasons and demonstrates the surprising properties of several species, including the predatory pond-dwelling bladderwort utricularia and a fungus that appears to be capable of mind control. He also discusses the largest single organism on the planet, visits the worlds biggest flower and explains how plants and insects can communicate using scents and music

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Kingdom of Plants
programme.desc: The naturalist concludes his exploration of the Royal Botanic Gardens in Kew, west London, by examining plants that have evolved to minimise their dependence on water, enabling them to survive in the worlds driest environments. He witnesses a cactus blooming at midnight, tells the story of the spectacular flowering of the Agave franzosinii, and visits the Millennium Seed Bank, a facility designed to save plants from future extinction

programme.desc: Life in the savannahs is ruled by water, so when harsh drought conditions prevail during the long dry season, waterholes become a coveted, crowded place

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A look at the lives of animals, a penguin uses a small pebble to symbolise his proposal, while a lemur in Madagascar uses millipedes as a form of pest control

programme.title: Animals Like Us
programme.desc: A line of hermit crabs prepare for a very orderly house swap on a Belize beach. Plus, a chimpanzee that keeps a cat as a pet

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Part one of two. The lives of three rival species, lions, leopards and cheetahs, revealing the strategies each has evolved to coexist in their shared world

programme.title: Big Cats Small World
programme.desc: Part two of two. Molelos pride are exhausted when the winter floods arrive. The cheetah cubs make a difficult decision, and a scary encounter makes leopard mum Sephiri choose between her old family and her new cubs

programme.title: Ocean Parks
programme.desc: Profiles of the worlds most spectacular marine habitats, beginning with the Caribbean island of Bonaire, a leading destination for eco-tourists

programme.title: Baboons: Rules of the Troop
programme.desc: Cameras follow four different species of baboons who have conquered African deserts, coasts, savannah and mountains, adapting to the challenges of their environment along the way

programme.title: Into the Wild: Colombia
programme.desc: Some of the remarkable animals that call Colombia home. In the heart of the rainforest, a young capuchin monkey must master his climbing skills, source his food and learn to distinguish friend from foe

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the first days, weeks and months of young animals, beginning by looking at how single offspring depend on their mothers

programme.title: Wild Animal Babies
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee explores how some siblings quickly forge lifelong bonds, while others compete ferociously from the moment theyre born

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Natural History Museum Alive
programme.desc: The broadcaster invites viewers to join him as he takes an after-hours stroll around one of his favourite places, the Natural History Museum. But this is no ordinary tour as some of the many exhibits spring to life as the veteran naturalist strolls along

programme.title: Micro Monsters with David Attenborough
programme.desc: David Attenborough employs the latest technologies to explore the violence, rivalries and deadly weaponry existing within the world of bugs. This first episode examines the survival tactics of its terrifying residents including killer ants, trap-setting spiders and beetles with the ability to shoot boiling chemicals at their enemies

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: An insight into the lives of elephant bulls in Mount Kilimanjaro and Amboseli, following their drive for dominance and the subtle social bonds that form between them

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: With the latest film-making technology, the veteran broadcaster uncovers the unseen natural treasures of Singapore and explores how the has adapted to humans

programme.title: David Attenboroughs Wild City
programme.desc: The veteran broadcaster narrates a day in the animal life of Singapores urban environments, from a troop of suburban macaques to a family of otters in Marina Bay

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: Naturalist and shark expert Steve Backshall celebrates the dazzling diversity of sharks, uncovering their secret lives and the threats they face. He begins by exploring the radical variety of sharks in the Atlantic Ocean and marks the start of a global journey in the so-called shark capital of the world, the Bahamas

programme.title: Shark with Steve Backshall
programme.desc: The naturalist learns about the sharks of the Indian Ocean, which despite finding ways to adapt to the environment, face threats from climate change, pollution and overfishing

programme.title: Gladiators
programme.desc: Documentary revealing the secrets and ingenious tactics of natures toughest fighters in their battles for survival. Narrated by Sean Bean

programme.title: Tusker: Brotherhood of Elephants
programme.desc: An insight into the lives of elephant bulls in Mount Kilimanjaro and Amboseli, following their drive for dominance and the subtle social bonds that form between them

programme.title: After the Wildfires
programme.desc: In 2020, Australia went up in flames. The scale and intensity signified an undeniable new phase in the global climate crisis. For Australias wildlife, who have adapted to severities of weather, it was cataclysmic. And for those who did survive, the real challenge only now begins. This documentary examines the toll, the recovery and the healing of the wild after Australias wildfires

programme.title: Impossible Animals
programme.desc: Patrick Aryee examines the animals that live on the coast. From crashing waves to extreme tides, surviving here takes ingenuity and incredible adaptations

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: The partnership between clownfish and anemones, as well as the quid-pro-poo agreements of dung beetles and pitcher plants

programme.title: Planet Weird
programme.desc: The world of the cannibalistic portia spider as it devours the competition, as well as the bloodthirsty side of cuddly koalas and an epic giraffe battle

programme.title: Mad Max (1979)
programme.desc: In the near future, Australian cop Max Rockatansky tires of battling to impose law and order on the roads and turns in his badge - only to be forced out of retirement when his wife and child are murdered at the hands of a motorcycle gang. George Millers action thriller, starring Mel Gibson, Joanne Samuel and Hugh Keays-Byrne

programme.title: Vendetta (2022)
programme.desc: When his daughter is brutally murdered and legal justice looks unlikely, William Duncan takes the law into his own hands, setting out on a quest for retribution. After killing the street thug who was directly responsible for her death, he finds himself in the middle of a war with the dead mans brother, who is equally hell-bent on getting even. Action thriller, starring Bruce Willis and Thomas Jane

programme.title: Long Gone Heroes (2024)
programme.desc: A battle-hardened special forces operative attempts to rescue his kidnapped niece when a mercenary mission spirals into chaos. Action thriller, starring Eden Brolin, Andy Garcia and Melissa Leo

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop (1984)
programme.desc: Fast-talking Detroit cop Axel Foley heads for Los Angeles after an old friend is murdered before his eyes. His search for the killers leads him into conflict with a seemingly untouchable drug kingpin, but he also has to contend with the local force, who do not want him taking matters into his own hands. Comedy thriller, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Ronny Cox, John Ashton and Steven Berkoff

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop II (1987)
programme.desc: Wisecracking Detroit detective Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles to investigate the shooting of an old friend, and uncovers a connection with a spate of violent robberies carried out by a criminal who leaves a mysterious calling card. Comedy thriller sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, John Ashton, Ronny Cox and Brigitte Nielsen.

programme.title: Beverly Hills Cop III (1994)
programme.desc: Maverick cop Axel Foley returns to Los Angeles when an investigation into a colleagues murder leads him to a Hollywood theme park. He enlists the help of old ally Rosewood to prove the resort is a cover for a major counterfeiting ring connected to a terrorist conspiracy. Comedy adventure sequel, starring Eddie Murphy, Judge Reinhold, Theresa Randle and Bronson Pinchot.

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Eric makes a last-ditch attempt to save Nora by smuggling her out of the compound and finding Bill. Meanwhile, the latest goings-on have badly affected Arlene, and she turns to drink

programme.title: True Blood
programme.desc: Sookie faces a major dilemma when deciding whether to broker a deal between Bill and Warlow. Jason gets to know Violet better at Vamp Camp, while Sarah has to take extreme measures to keep Tru Blood flowing

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: As the exhausted team members at ARC let Lester in on the secrets of Matts mission, they are interrupted by news that anomalies are opening everywhere and there are reports of a T-rex loose on the streets. Matt knows he must get to Philips machine and switch it off before it can create further havoc, but when Philip escapes Connors custody, the clock is ticking to stop him before its too late

programme.title: Primeval
programme.desc: The ARC is put under threat by an army of future predators as the team fights to prevent the destruction of Earth and save Connors life. Jess and Lester face a losing battle as they run out of weapons and ammunition, and with time ticking to stop Philips anomaly expanding, Matt prepares to risk his life in a last-ditch attempt to seal it. Sci-fi adventure, starring Ciaran McMenamin

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard is critically injured and taken to the sickbay for treatment, but appears to pass into the afterlife, where Q is waiting to greet him. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part one of two. Worf learns his father was not killed in a battle 25 years ago, as he had previously thought, but was taken to a distant Romulan penal colony. Meanwhile, Data experiences disturbing visions. Sci-fi adventure, starring Michael Dorn and Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Part two of two. Worf discovers elderly Klingons are being held captive in a penal colony under the benevolent control of a Romulan governor. Sci-fi adventure, starring Michael Dorn

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Picard uncovers a plot to steal the highly dangerous compound trilithium from the starships engines. Sci-fi drama, starring Patrick Stewart and Brent Spiner

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The new head of the cartography section, Commander Nella Darren, attracts an admirer in Captain Picard, who then has to send her on a risky mission. Sci-fi adventure, starring Patrick Stewart and Wendy Hughes

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: A member of the Q continuum is inadvertently brought aboard the Voyager, forcing Janeway to conduct a bizarre life-or-death trial. Sci-fi adventure, starring Kate Mulgrew, with a guest appearance by Jonathan Frakes

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Romance blossoms in Voyagers sick bay as the Doctor creates a holographic clone to house the consciousness of an ailing Vidiian female. Sci-fi drama, starring Kate Mulgrew and Robert Picardo

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Disillusioned by the inflexibility of Starfleets regime, Tom Paris plans to leave Voyager and join a Talaxian convoy. When Neelix finds out he decides to draw on his new-found journalistic skills to pursue the case

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: The ship stalls in a plasma cloud during a desperate attempt to escape pursuing Vidiian vessels, causing a chain of technical malfunctions. In the middle of the chaos, Captain Janeway makes a remarkable discovery and takes an important step - with the lives of the crew depending on her actions

programme.title: Star Trek: Voyager
programme.desc: Tuvok crash-lands his shuttle on a haven for an alien race that shuns contact with outsiders, and it is not long before he is forced to protect three colonist children from a monster. Sci-fi drama, starring Tim Russ

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: As the world falls into chaos, Serac gains control of Delos, changing Charlottes plan. Maeve gets one last chance to stop Dolores. Starring Evan Rachel Wood and Thandiwe Newton

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Bernard, Stubbs, and William escape from all the chaos. Meanwhile, Caleb gains an insight on the true nature of his past. Starring Evan Rachel Wood

programme.title: Westworld
programme.desc: Dolores true intentions are finally revealed. Meanwhile, Bernard confronts a ghost from his past, and William faces an unexpected adversary

programme.title: Westworld

programme.title: Westworld

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill and the team try to end a deadly war game being played out on a planet populated by soldiers, but find the weapons turned against them. Sci-fi drama, starring Richard Dean Anderson

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Daniel Jackson is reunited with his long-lost wife Share, but owing to unfortunate circumstances they find themselves on opposing sides, and painful sacrifices have to be made. Sci-fi drama, starring Michael Shanks

programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: ONeill and the team encounter an entire world suffering from amnesia, the effects of which could cause mass devastation. programme.title: Stargate SG-1
programme.desc: Part one of two. Samantha Carter battles to access her memories of Jolinar to save her father, who has been captured by the evil Goauld System Lord Sokar. Sci-fi drama, starring Amanda Tapping

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Worf and Dax embark on a hazardous mission behind enemy lines, and despite the difficulty of the journey, it proves to be almost like a honeymoon for the newlyweds. But danger is just around the corner when Jadzia is critically injured by a JemHadar patrol, leaving her husband facing the almost impossible dilemma of choosing between love and duty. Sci-fi drama, with Michael Dorn and Terry Farrell

programme.sub-title: Wrongs Darker Than Death or Night

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: High-ranking investigating officers infiltrate the station and force Sisko to allow them free rein. programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Sisko tries to trick the Romulans into declaring war against the Dominion, realising that to save the Federation, he must betray several of its core principles

programme.title: Star Trek: Deep Space Nine
programme.desc: Dr Bashirs hologram nightclub guest singer, Vic Fontaine, turns out to be an expert on personal relationships, and tries to help Odo overcome his inhibitions. Sci-fi drama, starring Rene Auberjonois and Avery Brooks

programme.desc: Nora finds an unlikely ally in her quest, while Laurie attempts to track down Kevin

programme.title: The Leftovers
programme.sub-title: The Most Powerful Man in the World (and His Identical Twin Brother)
programme.desc: On a mission of mercy, Kevin assumes an alternate identity. Mystery drama, starring Justin Theroux, Amy Brenneman, Christopher Eccleston and Liv Tyler

programme.title: The Leftovers
programme.desc: In the final episode, Nora makes the decision to enter Dr Eden and Dr Bekkers experimental machine. Before the procedure, she and Matt reminisce on their orphaned childhood and she bids farewell to her brother

programme.title: Oldboy (2003)
programme.desc: A man is abducted and locked away in a small room for 15 years then suddenly set free, with no explanation for why he was incarcerated. Bewildered and disorientated, he struggles to adapt to his new-found freedom, but vows to find out what has become of his family and who his captors were so he can mete out his own brand of revenge. Thriller, directed by Park Chan-wook, starring Choi Min-sik, Gang Hye-jung and Yu Ji-tae. In Korean

programme.title: Blue Bloods
programme.desc: Jamie faces backlash from fellow officers when he partners with Erin and Anthony to investigate an underground bar used by the NYPD and FDNY to hide their criminal indiscretions

programme.title: FBI

programme.desc: In this edition, a man follows a woman and then robs her in her own home, while a burglar tries to steal from a farm, but the farmers are used to to dealing with rogue animals

programme.desc: Police launch an operation to catch the criminals who stashed stolen goods in a wood, and a thief gets more than he bargained for when trying to steal from a launderette

programme.desc: Officers use a pin manoeuvre to neutralise a couple suspected of stealing a truck, and rush to save someone who is suspected of having overdosed

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard worries his lack of American football knowledge is alienating him from Penny and her friends. However, he finds an unlikely sporting tutor in the form of Sheldon, who reluctantly spent most of his childhood attending games with his father. Meanwhile, Raj is infuriated when Howard abandons him to pursue a girl at a kite-fighting contest

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: A jealous Leonard argues with Penny when she invites one of her male friends to stay at her apartment while he is in town. Unfortunately, the row brings up unpleasant memories for Sheldon of watching his warring parents, causing even more tension between the friends. Johnny Galecki, Kaley Cuoco and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howards fear of commitment causes him to avoid Bernadette, but he soon realises he has made a mistake and tries to compensate for it. Meanwhile, Kripke plays a prank during a radio interview with Sheldon, who sets out to get revenge, only to be caught by the Dean. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Kaley Cuoco star, with an appearance by Katee Sackhoff (Battlestar Galactica) as herself

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Bernadette asks Leonard about his physics experiment, making Howard so jealous that she threatens to end their relationship. Penny also feels put out by the situation, and asks Sheldon to teach her about science. Johnny Galecki, Simon Helberg and Melissa Rauch star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonards mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Pennys belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon develops a mental block and has difficulty working on a formula, so in a move inspired by Albert Einstein he gets a job at the Cheesecake Factory diner to try to revive his creativity - and despite Pennys objections, proves surprisingly effective in the role. Guest starring Yeardley Smith (The voice of Lisa Simpson)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentines Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows hell have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isnt long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj and Howard register Sheldon with an online dating site hoping to find his perfect female equivalent. Meanwhile, a drunk Penny seduces Leonard, but regrets it the next day. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco. Mayim Bialik makes her first appearance on the show

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howards new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Rajs sister Priya visits the gang, causing tension when Leonard tries to cover up the fling he once had with her. After discovering his friends secret, Sheldon struggles to keep quiet, leading the guys to reveal information they have all been keeping from one another

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard vows to be more self-assured around women, believing his problem attracting a girlfriend stems from a lack of confidence. An FBI agent interviews the gang to assess Howards suitability for a team working on a new surveillance satellite. Guest starring Eliza Dushku

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends set up camp outside a cinema to get tickets for a new cut of Raiders of the Lost Ark - but find themselves resuming hostilities with Sheldons old foe Wil Wheaton, the former Star Trek: The Next Generation actor. Meanwhile, Penny and Bernadette invite Amy to a sleepover

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Pennys father pays a visit and Leonard discovers she told her parents they were back together, so he plays his boyfriend role to the hilt - much to her dismay. Meanwhile, Raj gets drunk and makes a pass at Howards girlfriend Bernadette. Guest starring Keith Carradine

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy finds she has romantic feelings for Pennys former boyfriend Zack, while Raj and Howard begin competing to prove which of them would make the better superhero. Comedy, guest starring Brian Thomas Smith

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard is torn between his relationship with Bernadette and pleasing his mother - and comes up with a solution that leaves everyone unsatisfied. Leonard rekindles his romance with Rajs sister Priya, while Amy uses Pennys emotions as the basis for a research project

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon decides to make a new set of friends as he is depressed that the groups social world revolves around Leonard rather than himself. programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard faces the difficult decision of choosing between his relationship with Priya and his friendship with Penny, while Sheldon is irritated by one of Howards magic tricks. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is distraught when his online gaming account is hacked, so his friends decide to find out who is responsible. However, they make the disastrous mistake of confronting the culprit in person. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki, Jim Parsons and Kaley Cuoco

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Amy and Penny use Bernadette to spy on Leonard and Priya after the couple invite her and Howard to dinner. An experimental drug helps Raj overcome his fear of talking to women, but proves more effective than he had expected. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Howard decides to tell his mother that he and Bernadette are engaged - but she later collapses, making him fear the shock of the news has caused her to suffer a heart attack. programme.desc: Leonards mother visits and he is horrified to learn that Sheldon knows more than he does about his own family, including his parents impending divorce and the death of his dog. Guest starring Christine Baranski

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Raj lusts after a girl he and Sheldon meet at a university party, and Leonard comes to regret airing his disapproval of Pennys belief in psychics. Comedy, starring Kunal Nayyar and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard and Sheldons flat is burgled, so they work on a state-of-the-art security system in a bid to outwit any future would-be thieves. However, their plans go awry when they ensnare Penny in a net. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon develops a mental block and has difficulty working on a formula, so in a move inspired by Albert Einstein he gets a job at the Cheesecake Factory diner to try to revive his creativity - and despite Pennys objections, proves surprisingly effective in the role. Guest starring Yeardley Smith (The voice of Lisa Simpson)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is invited to visit the Large Hadron Collider in Switzerland and asks Penny to join him as a Valentines Day treat. However, Sheldon tries to persuade the couple to allow him to take her place

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon misses an opportunity to meet Spider-Man co-creator Stan Lee when he has to go to court for driving through a red light, and his anger leads to his imprisonment. Penny finds out the address of the comic-book writer and takes Sheldon there - but his troubles with the law have yet to reach their conclusion and the visit does not go as expected

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The friends fight over a ring they believe was used in the Lord of the Rings film trilogy. Leonard hopes to return the item to its rightful owner - but Raj wishes to sell it so he can buy a jet ski, and Sheldon develops a Gollum-like obsession with the precious object

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon is awarded a prestigious prize by the university, but is scared of collecting the gong at a ceremony because he knows hell have to give a speech. Penny tries to gee him up with rousing references to X-Men, and Leonard and Raj offer psychological guidance - without much success

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard tells Penny he loves her, but fails to get the response he would have liked. Sheldon also finds himself competing against Star Trek: The Next Generation actor Wil Wheaton once again when the gang goes bowling - and tries to get his revenge

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to hide the fact he had dinner with Penny after she broke up with Leonard, hoping to stay friends with her. However, keeping secrets does not prove to be his strong point, and it isnt long before his deceit is exposed. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons, Kaley Cuoco and Johnny Galecki

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon invites a famous physicist to the flat after befriending her online, but is put out to find Leonard showing an interest in her. Meanwhile, Penny has to confront her ex-boyfriend when the visitor turns up in his bedroom. Guest starring Judy Greer (Glenn Martin, DDS)

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: The comedy flashes back to reveal how Sheldon saved the lives of his pals, and looks at the origins of his friendship with Leonard seven years previously, as well as explaining the housemates agreement. Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons star

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Penny is stunned when Sheldon announces he is about to go on his first-ever date, and is even more surprised to find herself tagging along. Meanwhile, Leonard and Raj take a trip to the hospital after Howards new robotic arm creates problems

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon tries to extend his lifespan, concerned he will not be around long enough for his consciousness to be downloaded into a robot body, and the friends encounter Apple co-founder Steve Wozniak (guest starring as himself) at the Cheesecake Factory

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Sheldon breaks up with Amy and turns to cats in his search for an alternative to human companionship. However, when he starts to bulk-buy pets, Leonard decides enough is enough and calls for reinforcements to help bring his friend back to his senses. Comedy, starring Jim Parsons

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory
programme.desc: Leonard is depressed that everyone seems to be paired off except him, and resorts to desperate measures to get a girlfriend. Meanwhile, Sheldon looks for a way out of his relationship with Amy, who wants him to meet her mother. Comedy, starring Johnny Galecki and Jim Parsons

programme.title: Love Your Garden
programme.desc: Alan Titchmarsh and his team come to the aid of nonagenarian Roberta and her 86-year-old best friend and carer Enid, who live together in a retirement bungalow in Wiveliscombe, Somerset. Originally from Liverpool, the two plucky pensioners have helped each other out countless times throughout the course of their friendship, which has lasted seven decades. However, they now find themselves trapped in their home by a treacherous slope in their garden, so Alan plans to set them free by designing a future-proofed garden in a vintage style

programme.title: Love Your Garden

His idea for the Drakes is to give them an outdoor space that reflects terminally ill dad Andrews love of the great outdoors and his passion for working with wood. He opts for a garden with a frontier-land theme that Andrew, wife Rachel and their young son Lucas can enjoy, creating a prairie-inspired back yard of big scale rustic wood structures, agricultural motifs with craftsmanship and the spirit of adventure at its core

programme.title: Love Your Garden

programme.title: Country House Auction

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Mark Evans meets more people who aspire to live in their ultimate waterside dream home. Simon and Mary Sparrow live on a barge in Beccles, Suffolk, with their son Nate and their two cats. The Sparrows have been running a boatyard for nearly 10 years, specialising in refurbishing and renting out floating homes to holidaymakers. Now theyre designing and building a new, one-of-a-kind floating home for themselves - a futuristic-looking floating pod, drawing on a budget of £70,000

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: Alan and Val McCoy put their life savings on the line to make their dream of living on water come true, entrusting a boat builder to make them their dream narrow boat floating home. The couple have been together for 11 years and now that theyre retired, theyve decided that owning a narrow boat could be a unique way to be near their families - all of whom live along the canal system across the Midlands and north-west England

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: This edition charts the exploits of Pat and Sue Willan, who now retired plan to buy their very last floating home, which they hope to keep moored on the Thames. They have enlisted the help of a boat-maker in Stoke and opted for a 35-tonne, 55-foot state-of-the-art, all-mod-cons Dutch barge. They have a healthy budget of over £400,000 and elaborate plans for very contemporary kitchen fittings and gadgets and a powerful hydraulic engine

programme.title: My Floating Home
programme.desc: South African-born Linda, her husband Mark and Coco the cat share a one-bedroom floating home on Taggs Island in Hampton, Surrey. Its an idyllic location, but their home is also their workplace and its starting to feel a bit cramped. The couple want to stay put in their exclusive location, so Linda has hatched an ambitious plan to buy the boat next door and do it up all by herself. Its a huge challenge and it remains to be seen whether enthusiasm and passion will be enough to get the job done

programme.title: Waking Ned (1998)

Eager to get their hands on the money, two of his friends pretend he is still alive - and soon have the entire community conspiring to keep up the pretence in return for a share of the jackpot. Comedy, starring David Kelly, Ian Bannen, James Nesbitt, Fionnula Flanagan and Susan Lynch

Comedy, starring Bartlett Mullins and Maggie Wright

With Christopher Plummer, Trevor Howard, Yul Brynner, Romy Schneider and Claudine Auger

programme.desc: A woman sues her nephew for allegedly slamming a log through her bedroom window and then coming back hours later to vandalise her car.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A cold-press juicer and a waitress have a whirlwind romance that ends with a fight over an unpaid loan, a mattress and harassment.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: A woman loses custody of her children after remaining in the same home as a sex offender family member; she is sued by her sister-in-law for childcare costs.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Two days after their son is born, unwed parents dissolve their shared living arrangement; a restraining order and alleged harassment soon follow.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Friends for over 20 years end their relationship when an untenable living arrangement and a car impound come to light.

programme.title: Judge Judy
programme.desc: Real-life small-claims cases on issues affecting family life, presided over by outspoken former New York judge Judy Sheindlin

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Mooney and the team enter the high-stakes world of poker when Bobby Rodrigues, the favourite to win the Caribbean Masters tournament, is poisoned mid-game. As all fellow players are confined to their seats for the entire match, and no other individual is allowed access to the stage during that time, suspicion soon falls upon each player. A novice to poker, Jack enlists Dwaynes assistance in getting the players to show their hand, while Florence, who is forced to keep away from work after an injury, finds her own way to help the case. Nigel Planer, Mark Benton and Zoe Telford guest star

programme.title: My Life Is Murder
programme.desc: Alexa investigates the hit-and-run death of an assistant to a PR mogul. Although the drunk driver involved turned herself in, Alexa believes the accident may be the work of an opportunistic killer. To her surprise, she finds a simple bus timetable holds the clue to whodunit - and why. Detective thriller, starring Lucy Lawless and Bernard Curry

programme.title: Death in Paradise
programme.desc: DI Jack Mooney and the team are called to a workshop where acclaimed artist Donna Harman has been found dead. Suspicion immediately falls on the three people closest to the crime scene, but with no one entering the workshop between the time the victim returned to start on her next painting and being found dead, the scene paints a tricky picture. Only a solitary drink can seems to hold the answer, but matters are complicated when Donnas art dealer and an art collector enter the fray. Meanwhile, Jack is confused by his blossoming feelings for Anna. Whodunit, starring Ardal OHanlon, with Nina Wadia, Barbara Flynn, Louise Brealey and Vivienne Acheampong

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Stand-up star David ODoherty, Pointless co-host Richard Osman, comedienne Susan Calman and weather presenter Carol Kirkwood join team captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack for the panel show, trying to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible lies about themselves. Rob Brydon hosts

programme.title: Would I Lie to You?
programme.desc: Comedian Josh Widdicombe, presenter Gemma Cairney, auctioneer Raj Bisram and fashion designer Sophie Hermann join host Rob Brydon and regular captains David Mitchell and Lee Mack on the comedy panel show. As usual, the participants set out to hoodwink their opponents with absurd facts and plausible fibs about themselves in a bid to secure a team victory, through rounds including Home Truths and Quick-fire Lies

programme.title: Mike
programme.desc: Desiree Washington, an 18-year-old student and Miss Black America contestant, accuses Mike of rape and leads to an ugly and highly-publicised trial

programme.title: Mike
programme.desc: Mike reflects on his three years in prison at the Indiana Department of Corrections after public protests and an expensive appeals process fail to get him the results he wanted.

programme.title: Mike
programme.desc: After his stint in prison, Mikes desperation to relaunch his boxing career leads to an infamous fight with Evander Holyfield and the bite heard round the world

programme.title: Mike
programme.desc: Mike faces up to his demons after his temporary suspension from boxing - and a tragedy in his personal life - as he comes to terms with who he really is
